ar: ۞وَمَآ أَنزَلۡنَا عَلَىٰ قَوۡمِهِۦ مِنۢ بَعۡدِهِۦ مِن جُندࣲ مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَمَا كُنَّا مُنزِلِينَ
t: Wama anzalna AAala qawmihi min baAAdihi min jundin mina alssamai wama kunna munzileena
u: Iske baad uski qaum par humne aasmaan se koi lashkar nahin utara , humein lashkar bhejne ki koi haajat na thi

ar: إِن كَانَتۡ إِلَّا صَيۡحَةࣰ وَٰحِدَةࣰ فَإِذَا هُمۡ خَٰمِدُونَ
t: In kanat illa sayhatan wahidatan faitha hum khamidoona
u: Bas ek dhamaka hua aur yakayak woh sab bujh kar reh gaye

ar: يَٰحَسۡرَةً عَلَى ٱلۡعِبَادِۚ مَا يَأۡتِيهِم مِّن رَّسُولٍ إِلَّا كَانُواْ بِهِۦ يَسۡتَهۡزِءُونَ
t: Ya hasratan AAala alAAibadi ma yateehim min rasoolin illa kanoo bihi yastahzioona
u: Afsos bandon ke haal par, jo Rasool bhi unke paas aaya uska woh mazaaq hi udatey rahey

ar: أَلَمۡ يَرَوۡاْ كَمۡ أَهۡلَكۡنَا قَبۡلَهُم مِّنَ ٱلۡقُرُونِ أَنَّهُمۡ إِلَيۡهِمۡ لَا يَرۡجِعُونَ
t: Alam yaraw kam ahlakna qablahum mina alqurooni annahum ilayhim la yarjiAAoona
u: Kya unhon ne dekha nahin ke unsey pehle kitni hi qaumon ko hum halaak kar chuke hain aur iske baad woh phir kabhi unki taraf palat kar na aaye

ar: وَإِن كُلࣱّ لَّمَّا جَمِيعࣱ لَّدَيۡنَا مُحۡضَرُونَ
t: Wain kullun lamma jameeAAun ladayna muhdaroona
u: Un sab ko ek roz hamare saamne haazir kiya jaana hai

ar: وَءَايَةࣱ لَّهُمُ ٱلۡأَرۡضُ ٱلۡمَيۡتَةُ أَحۡيَيۡنَٰهَا وَأَخۡرَجۡنَا مِنۡهَا حَبࣰّ ا فَمِنۡهُ يَأۡكُلُونَ
t: Waayatun lahumu alardu almaytatu ahyaynaha waakhrajna minha habban faminhu yakuloona
u: In logon ke liye be-jaan zameen ek nishani hai, humne isko zindagi bakshi aur issey galla (anaaj / grain) nikala jisey yeh khaate hain

ar: وَجَعَلۡنَا فِيهَا جَنَّٰتࣲ مِّن نَّخِيلࣲ وَأَعۡنَٰبࣲ وَفَجَّرۡنَا فِيهَا مِنَ ٱلۡعُيُونِ
t: WajaAAalna feeha jannatin min nakheelin waaAAnabin wafajjarna feeha mina alAAuyooni
u: Humne ismein khajuron aur angooron ke baagh paida kiye aur uske andar chashme (springs) phodh nikale

ar: لِيَأۡكُلُواْ مِن ثَمَرِهِۦ وَمَا عَمِلَتۡهُ أَيۡدِيهِمۡۚ أَفَلَا يَشۡكُرُونَ
t: Liyakuloo min thamarihi wama AAamilathu aydeehim afala yashkuroona
u: Taa-ke yeh uske phal khayein, yeh sab kuch inke apne haathon ka paida kiya hua nahin hai phir kya yeh shukar ada nahin karte

ar: سُبۡحَٰنَ ٱلَّذِي خَلَقَ ٱلۡأَزۡوَٰجَ كُلَّهَا مِمَّا تُنۢبِتُ ٱلۡأَرۡضُ وَمِنۡ أَنفُسِهِمۡ وَمِمَّا لَا يَعۡلَمُونَ
t: Subhana allathee khalaqa alazwaja kullaha mimma tunbitu alardu wamin anfusihim wamimma la yaAAlamoona
u: Paak hai woh zaat jisne jumla aqsaam ke joday paida kiye khwah woh zameen ki nabataat mein se hon ya khud inki apni jins (yani naw-e-Insani) mein se ya un ashyah mein se jinko yeh jaante tak nahin hain

ar: وَءَايَةࣱ لَّهُمُ ٱلَّيۡلُ نَسۡلَخُ مِنۡهُ ٱلنَّهَارَ فَإِذَا هُم مُّظۡلِمُونَ
t: Waayatun lahumu allaylu naslakhu minhu alnnahara faitha hum muthlimoona
u: Inke liye ek aur nishani raat hai, hum uske upar se din hata dete hain to inpar andhera chaa jata hai

ar: وَٱلشَّمۡسُ تَجۡرِي لِمُسۡتَقَرࣲّ لَّهَاۚ ذَٰلِكَ تَقۡدِيرُ ٱلۡعَزِيزِ ٱلۡعَلِيمِ
t: Waalshshamsu tajree limustaqarrin laha thalika taqdeeru alAAazeezi alAAaleemi
u: Aur Suraj, woh apne thikane ki taraf chala ja raha hai, yeh zabardat aleem(All-Knowing) hasti ka bandha hua hisaab hai

ar: وَٱلۡقَمَرَ قَدَّرۡنَٰهُ مَنَازِلَ حَتَّىٰ عَادَ كَٱلۡعُرۡجُونِ ٱلۡقَدِيمِ
t: Waalqamara qaddarnahu manazila hatta AAada kaalAAurjooni alqadeemi
u: Aur chand, uske liye humne manzilein muqarrar kardi hain yahan tak ke insey guzarta hua woh phir khajur ki sukhi shaakh (dry old branch) ke manind reh jata hai

ar: لَا ٱلشَّمۡسُ يَنۢبَغِي لَهَآ أَن تُدۡرِكَ ٱلۡقَمَرَ وَلَا ٱلَّيۡلُ سَابِقُ ٱلنَّهَارِۚ وَكُلࣱّ فِي فَلَكࣲ يَسۡبَحُونَ
t: La alshshamsu yanbaghee laha an tudrika alqamara wala allaylu sabiqu alnnahari wakullun fee falakin yasbahoona
u: Na Suraj ke bas mein yeh hai ke woh chand ko ja pakde aur na raat din par sabqat le ja sakti hai. Sab ek ek falak mein tair rahey hain

ar: وَءَايَةࣱ لَّهُمۡ أَنَّا حَمَلۡنَا ذُرِّيَّتَهُمۡ فِي ٱلۡفُلۡكِ ٱلۡمَشۡحُونِ
t: Waayatun lahum anna hamalna thurriyyatahum fee alfulki almashhooni
u: Inke liye yeh bhi ek nishani hai ke humne inki nasal ko bhari hui kashti mein sawaar kardiya

ar: وَخَلَقۡنَا لَهُم مِّن مِّثۡلِهِۦ مَا يَرۡكَبُونَ
t: Wakhalaqna lahum min mithlihi ma yarkaboona
u: Aur phir inke liye waisi hi kashtiyan aur paida ki jinpar yeh sawaar hotay hain

ar: وَإِن نَّشَأۡ نُغۡرِقۡهُمۡ فَلَا صَرِيخَ لَهُمۡ وَلَا هُمۡ يُنقَذُونَ
t: Wain nasha nughriqhum fala sareekha lahum wala hum yunqathoona
u: Hum chahein to inko garq kardein, koi inki fariyad sunne wala na ho aur kisi tarah yeh na bachaye jaa sakein

ar: إِلَّا رَحۡمَةࣰ مِّنَّا وَمَتَٰعًا إِلَىٰ حِينࣲ‏
t: Illa rahmatan minna wamataAAan ila heenin
u: Bas hamari rehmat hi hai jo inhein paar lagati aur ek waqt e khaas tak zindagi se mutamatta (enjoyment) honay ka mauqa deti hai

ar: وَإِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمُ ٱتَّقُواْ مَا بَيۡنَ أَيۡدِيكُمۡ وَمَا خَلۡفَكُمۡ لَعَلَّكُمۡ تُرۡحَمُونَ
t: Waitha qeela lahumu ittaqoo ma bayna aydeekum wama khalfakum laAAallakum turhamoona
u: In logon se jab kaha jaata hai ke bacho us anjaam se jo tumhare aagey aa raha hai aur tumhare peechey guzar chukka hai, shayad ke tumpar reham kiya jaye (to yeh suni an suni kar jatey hain)

ar: وَمَا تَأۡتِيهِم مِّنۡ ءَايَةࣲ مِّنۡ ءَايَٰتِ رَبِّهِمۡ إِلَّا كَانُواْ عَنۡهَا مُعۡرِضِينَ
t: Wama tateehim min ayatin min ayati rabbihim illa kanoo AAanha muAArideena
u: Inke saamne inke Rubb ki aayat(nishani) mein se jo aayat(nishani) bhi aati hai yeh iski taraf iltifaat nahin karte

ar: وَإِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمۡ أَنفِقُواْ مِمَّا رَزَقَكُمُ ٱللَّهُ قَالَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ لِلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓاْ أَنُطۡعِمُ مَن لَّوۡ يَشَآءُ ٱللَّهُ أَطۡعَمَهُۥٓ إِنۡ أَنتُمۡ إِلَّا فِي ضَلَٰلࣲ مُّبِينࣲ‏
t: Waitha qeela lahum anfiqoo mimma razaqakumu Allahu qala allatheena kafaroo lillatheena amanoo anutAAimu man law yashao Allahu atAAamahu in antum illa fee dalalin mubeenin
u: Aur jab insey kaha jaata hai ke Allah ne jo rizq tumhein ata kiya hai usmein se kuch Allah ki raah mein bhi kharch karo to yeh log jinhon ne kufr kiya hai iman laney walon ko jawab dete hain “ kya hum unko khilayein jinhein agar Allah chahta to khud khila deta? Tum to bilkul hi behak gaye ho”

ar: وَيَقُولُونَ مَتَىٰ هَٰذَا ٱلۡوَعۡدُ إِن كُنتُمۡ صَٰدِقِينَ
t: Wayaqooloona mata hatha alwaAAdu in kuntum sadiqeena
u: Yeh log kehte hain ke “yeh qayamat ki dhamki aakhir kab poori hogi? Batao agar tum sacche ho”

ar: مَا يَنظُرُونَ إِلَّا صَيۡحَةࣰ وَٰحِدَةࣰ تَأۡخُذُهُمۡ وَهُمۡ يَخِصِّمُونَ
t: Ma yanthuroona illa sayhatan wahidatan takhuthuhum wahum yakhissimoona
u: Dar-asal yeh jis cheez ki raah takk rahey hain woh bas ek dhamaka hai jo yakayak inhein ain us halat mein dhar lega jab yeh (apne dunyavi maamlaat mein) jhagad rahey hongey

ar: فَلَا يَسۡتَطِيعُونَ تَوۡصِيَةࣰ وَلَآ إِلَىٰٓ أَهۡلِهِمۡ يَرۡجِعُونَ
t: Fala yastateeAAoona tawsiyatan wala ila ahlihim yarjiAAoona
u: Aur us waqt yeh wasiyat tak na kar sakenge, na apne gharon ko palat sakenge

ar: وَنُفِخَ فِي ٱلصُّورِ فَإِذَا هُم مِّنَ ٱلۡأَجۡدَاثِ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِمۡ يَنسِلُونَ
t: Wanufikha fee alssoori faitha hum mina alajdathi ila rabbihim yansiloona
u: Phir ek soor (trumpet) phoonka jayega aur yakayak ye apne Rubb ke huzur pesh honay ke liye apni qabaron se nikal padenge

ar: قَالُواْ يَٰوَيۡلَنَا مَنۢ بَعَثَنَا مِن مَّرۡقَدِنَاۜۗ هَٰذَا مَا وَعَدَ ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنُ وَصَدَقَ ٱلۡمُرۡسَلُونَ
t: Qaloo ya waylana man baAAathana min marqadina hatha ma waAAada alrrahmanu wasadaqa almursaloona
u: Ghabra kar kahenge : “Arey, yeh kisne humein hamari khwab-gaah se utha khada kiya?” Yeh wahi cheez hai jiska khuda e rehman ne wada kiya tha aur Rasoolon ki baat sacchi thi”

ar: إِن كَانَتۡ إِلَّا صَيۡحَةࣰ وَٰحِدَةࣰ فَإِذَا هُمۡ جَمِيعࣱ لَّدَيۡنَا مُحۡضَرُونَ
t: In kanat illa sayhatan wahidatan faitha hum jameeAAun ladayna muhdaroona
u: Ek hi zoar ki aawaz hogi aur sab ke sab hamare saamne haazir kardiye jayenge

ar: فَٱلۡيَوۡمَ لَا تُظۡلَمُ نَفۡسࣱ شَيۡـࣰٔ ا وَلَا تُجۡزَوۡنَ إِلَّا مَا كُنتُمۡ تَعۡمَلُونَ
t: Faalyawma la tuthlamu nafsun shayan wala tujzawna illa ma kuntum taAAmaloona
u: Aaj kisi par zarra barabar zulm na kiya jayega aur tumhein waisa hi badla diya jayega jaise amal tum karte rahe thay

ar: إِنَّ أَصۡحَٰبَ ٱلۡجَنَّةِ ٱلۡيَوۡمَ فِي شُغُلࣲ فَٰكِهُونَ
t: Inna ashaba aljannati alyawma fee shughulin fakihoona
u: Aaj jannati log mazey karne mein mashgul hain

ar: هُمۡ وَأَزۡوَٰجُهُمۡ فِي ظِلَٰلٍ عَلَى ٱلۡأَرَآئِكِ مُتَّكِـُٔونَ
t: Hum waazwajuhum fee thilalin AAala alaraiki muttakioona
u: Woh aur unki biwiyan ghanay saayon (shades) mein hain masnadon par takiye lagaye huey

ar: لَهُمۡ فِيهَا فَٰكِهَةࣱ وَلَهُم مَّا يَدَّعُونَ
t: Lahum feeha fakihatun walahum ma yaddaAAoona
u: Har qisam ki lazeez cheezein khane peene ko unke liye wahan maujood hain, jo kuch woh talab karein unke liye haazir hai

ar: سَلَٰمࣱ قَوۡلࣰ ا مِّن رَّبࣲّ رَّحِيمࣲ‏
t: Salamun qawlan min rabbin raheemin
u: Rubb e Raheem ki taraf se unko salaam kaha gaya hai

ar: وَٱمۡتَٰزُواْ ٱلۡيَوۡمَ أَيُّهَا ٱلۡمُجۡرِمُونَ
t: Waimtazoo alyawma ayyuha almujrimoona
u: Aur aey mujrimon, aaj tum chatt kar alag ho jao

ar: ۞أَلَمۡ أَعۡهَدۡ إِلَيۡكُمۡ يَٰبَنِيٓ ءَادَمَ أَن لَّا تَعۡبُدُواْ ٱلشَّيۡطَٰنَۖ إِنَّهُۥ لَكُمۡ عَدُوࣱّ مُّبِينࣱ‏
t: Alam aAAhad ilaykum ya banee adama an la taAAbudoo alshshaytana innahu lakum AAaduwwun mubeenun
u: Adam ke bacchon, kya maine tumko hidayat na ki thai ke shaytaan ki bandagi na karo, woh tumhara khula dushman hai

ar: وَأَنِ ٱعۡبُدُونِيۚ هَٰذَا صِرَٰطࣱ مُّسۡتَقِيمࣱ‏
t: Waani oAAbudoonee hatha siratun mustaqeemun
u: Aur meri hi bandagi karo, yeh seedha raasta hai

ar: وَلَقَدۡ أَضَلَّ مِنكُمۡ جِبِلࣰّ ا كَثِيرًاۖ أَفَلَمۡ تَكُونُواْ تَعۡقِلُونَ
t: Walaqad adalla minkum jibillan katheeran afalam takoonoo taAAqiloona
u: Magar iske bawajood usne tum mein se ek giroh-e-kaseer (great multitude of you) ko gumraah kardiya, kya tum aqal nahin rakhte thay

ar: هَٰذِهِۦ جَهَنَّمُ ٱلَّتِي كُنتُمۡ تُوعَدُونَ
t: Hathihi jahannamu allatee kuntum tooAAadoona
u: Yeh wahi jahannum hai jissey tumko daraya jata raha tha

ar: ٱصۡلَوۡهَا ٱلۡيَوۡمَ بِمَا كُنتُمۡ تَكۡفُرُونَ
t: Islawha alyawma bima kuntum takfuroona
u: Jo kufr tum duniya mein karte rahey ho uski padaish mein ab iska indhan (fuel) bano

ar: ٱلۡيَوۡمَ نَخۡتِمُ عَلَىٰٓ أَفۡوَٰهِهِمۡ وَتُكَلِّمُنَآ أَيۡدِيهِمۡ وَتَشۡهَدُ أَرۡجُلُهُم بِمَا كَانُواْ يَكۡسِبُونَ
t: Alyawma nakhtimu AAala afwahihim watukallimuna aydeehim watashhadu arjuluhum bima kanoo yaksiboona
u: Aaj hum inke mooh bandh kiye detey hain, inke haath humse bolenge aur inke paon gawahi denge ke yeh duniya mein kya kamayi karte rahey hain

ar: وَلَوۡ نَشَآءُ لَطَمَسۡنَا عَلَىٰٓ أَعۡيُنِهِمۡ فَٱسۡتَبَقُواْ ٱلصِّرَٰطَ فَأَنَّىٰ يُبۡصِرُونَ
t: Walaw nashao latamasna AAala aAAyunihim faistabaqoo alssirata faanna yubsiroona
u: Hum chahein to inki aankhein moond dein(obliterated their eyes), phir yeh raastey ki taraf lapak kar dekhein, kahan se inhein raasta sujhayi dega

ar: وَلَوۡ نَشَآءُ لَمَسَخۡنَٰهُمۡ عَلَىٰ مَكَانَتِهِمۡ فَمَا ٱسۡتَطَٰعُواْ مُضِيࣰّ ا وَلَا يَرۡجِعُونَ
t: Walaw nashao lamasakhnahum AAala makanatihim fama istataAAoo mudiyyan wala yarjiAAoona
u: Hum chahein to inhein inki jagah hi par is taraf maskh (transform) karke rakh dein ke yeh na aagey chal sakein na peechey palat sakein

ar: وَمَن نُّعَمِّرۡهُ نُنَكِّسۡهُ فِي ٱلۡخَلۡقِۚ أَفَلَا يَعۡقِلُونَ
t: Waman nuAAammirhu nunakkishu fee alkhalqi afala yaAAqiloona
u: Jis shaks ko hum lambi umar dete hain iski saakht ko hum ulat hi dete hain (we reverse in creation), kya (yeh halaat dekh kar) inhein aqal nahin aati

ar: وَمَا عَلَّمۡنَٰهُ ٱلشِّعۡرَ وَمَا يَنۢبَغِي لَهُۥٓۚ إِنۡ هُوَ إِلَّا ذِكۡرࣱ وَقُرۡءَانࣱ مُّبِينࣱ‏
t: Wama AAallamnahu alshshiAAra wama yanbaghee lahu in huwa illa thikrun waquranun mubeenun
u: Humne is (Nabi) ko sher nahin sikhaya hai aur na shayari isko zeib hi deti hai, yeh to ek naseehat hai aur saaf padhi janey wali kitaab

ar: لِّيُنذِرَ مَن كَانَ حَيࣰّ ا وَيَحِقَّ ٱلۡقَوۡلُ عَلَى ٱلۡكَٰفِرِينَ
t: Liyunthira man kana hayyan wayahiqqa alqawlu AAala alkafireena
u: Taa-ke woh har us shaks ko khabardar karde jo zinda ho aur inkar karne walon par hujjat qayam ho jaye

ar: أَوَلَمۡ يَرَوۡاْ أَنَّا خَلَقۡنَا لَهُم مِّمَّا عَمِلَتۡ أَيۡدِينَآ أَنۡعَٰمࣰ ا فَهُمۡ لَهَا مَٰلِكُونَ
t: Awalam yaraw anna khalaqna lahum mimma AAamilat aydeena anAAaman fahum laha malikoona
u: Kya yeh log dekhte nahin hain ke humne apne haathon ki banayi hui cheezon mein se inke liye maweshi paida kiye aur ab yeh inke maalik hain

ar: وَذَلَّلۡنَٰهَا لَهُمۡ فَمِنۡهَا رَكُوبُهُمۡ وَمِنۡهَا يَأۡكُلُونَ
t: Wathallalnaha lahum faminha rakoobuhum waminha yakuloona
u: Humne unhein is tarah inke bas mein kardiya hai ke unmein se kisi par yeh sawaar hotey hain, kisika yeh gosht khate hain

ar: وَلَهُمۡ فِيهَا مَنَٰفِعُ وَمَشَارِبُۚ أَفَلَا يَشۡكُرُونَ
t: Walahum feeha manafiAAu wamasharibu afala yashkuroona
u: Aur unke andar inke liye tarah tarah ke fawaid (benefits) aur mashrubaat (drinks) hain phir kya yeh shukar guzar nahin hotay

ar: وَٱتَّخَذُواْ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ ءَالِهَةࣰ لَّعَلَّهُمۡ يُنصَرُونَ
t: Waittakhathoo min dooni Allahi alihatan laAAallahum yunsaroona
u: Yeh sabkuch hotey huey inhon ne Allah ke siwa dusre khuda bana liye hain aur yeh umeed rakhte hain ke inki madad ki jayegi

ar: لَا يَسۡتَطِيعُونَ نَصۡرَهُمۡ وَهُمۡ لَهُمۡ جُندࣱ مُّحۡضَرُونَ
t: La yastateeAAoona nasrahum wahum lahum jundun muhdaroona
u: Woh inki koi madad nahin kar sakte balke yeh log ultey unke liye hazir-baash lashkar (army in waiting ) baney huey hain

ar: فَلَا يَحۡزُنكَ قَوۡلُهُمۡۘ إِنَّا نَعۡلَمُ مَا يُسِرُّونَ وَمَا يُعۡلِنُونَ
t: Fala yahzunka qawluhum inna naAAlamu ma yusirroona wama yuAAlinoona
u: Accha, jo baatein yeh bana rahey hain woh tumhein ranjeeda na karein, inki chupi aur khuli sab baaton ko hum jaante hain

ar: أَوَلَمۡ يَرَ ٱلۡإِنسَٰنُ أَنَّا خَلَقۡنَٰهُ مِن نُّطۡفَةࣲ فَإِذَا هُوَ خَصِيمࣱ مُّبِينࣱ‏
t: Awalam yara alinsanu anna khalaqnahu min nutfatin faitha huwa khaseemun mubeenun
u: Kya Insaan dekhta nahin hai ke humne usey nutfe(sperm drop) se paida kiya aur phir woh sareeh jhagdalu bankar khada ho gaya

ar: وَضَرَبَ لَنَا مَثَلࣰ ا وَنَسِيَ خَلۡقَهُۥۖ قَالَ مَن يُحۡيِ ٱلۡعِظَٰمَ وَهِيَ رَمِيمࣱ‏
t: Wadaraba lana mathalan wanasiya khalqahu qala man yuhyee alAAithama wahiya rameemun
u: Ab woh humpar misalein chaspan karta hai aur apni paidaish ko bhool jaata hai , kehta hai “kaun in haddiyon ko zinda karega jabke yeh boseeda (rotten) ho chuki hon?”

ar: قُلۡ يُحۡيِيهَا ٱلَّذِيٓ أَنشَأَهَآ أَوَّلَ مَرَّةࣲۖ وَهُوَ بِكُلِّ خَلۡقٍ عَلِيمٌ
t: Qul yuhyeeha allathee anshaaha awwala marratin wahuwa bikulli khalqin AAaleemun
u: Ussey kaho,inhein wahi zinda karega jisne pehle inhein paida kiya tha, aur woh takhleeq (creation) ka har kaam jaanta hai

ar: ٱلَّذِي جَعَلَ لَكُم مِّنَ ٱلشَّجَرِ ٱلۡأَخۡضَرِ نَارࣰ ا فَإِذَآ أَنتُم مِّنۡهُ تُوقِدُونَ
t: Allathee jaAAala lakum mina alshshajari alakhdari naran faitha antum minhu tooqidoona
u: Wahi jisne tumhare liye harey bharey (green) darakht se aag paida kardi aur tum ussey apne chuleh (stoves) roshan karte ho

ar: أَوَلَيۡسَ ٱلَّذِي خَلَقَ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضَ بِقَٰدِرٍ عَلَىٰٓ أَن يَخۡلُقَ مِثۡلَهُمۚ بَلَىٰ وَهُوَ ٱلۡخَلَّٰقُ ٱلۡعَلِيمُ
t: Awalaysa allathee khalaqa alssamawati waalarda biqadirin AAala an yakhluqa mithlahum bala wahuwa alkhallaqu alAAaleemu
u: Kya woh jisne aasmaano aur zameen ko paida kiya ispar qadir nahin hai ke in jaison ko paida kar sakey? Kyun nahin, jabke woh maahir khallaq (superb creator) hai

ar: إِنَّمَآ أَمۡرُهُۥٓ إِذَآ أَرَادَ شَيۡـًٔا أَن يَقُولَ لَهُۥ كُن فَيَكُونُ
t: Innama amruhu itha arada shayan an yaqoola lahu kun fayakoonu
u: Woh to jab kisi cheez ka irada karta hai to uska kaam bas yeh hai ke usey hukum de ke hoja aur woh jo jati hai

ar: فَسُبۡحَٰنَ ٱلَّذِي بِيَدِهِۦ مَلَكُوتُ كُلِّ شَيۡءࣲ وَإِلَيۡهِ تُرۡجَعُونَ
t: Fasubhana allathee biyadihi malakootu kulli shayin wailayhi turjaAAoona
u: Paak hai woh jiske haath mein har cheez ka mukammal iqtedar (full control) hai, aur usi ki taraf tum paltaye janey waale ho

ar: وَٱلصَّٰٓفَّٰتِ صَفࣰّ ا
t: Waalssaffati saffan
u: Qataar dar qataar saff baandhne walon ki kasam

ar: فَٱلزَّٰجِرَٰتِ زَجۡرࣰ ا
t: Faalzzajirati zajran
u: Phir unki kasam jo daatne phatkaar ne waley hain

ar: فَٱلتَّٰلِيَٰتِ ذِكۡرًا
t: Faalttaliyati thikran
u: Phir unki kasam jo kalaam e naseehat sunane waley hain

t: Inna ilahakum lawahidun
u: Tumhara mabood e haqiqi bas ek hi hai

ar: رَّبُّ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَا وَرَبُّ ٱلۡمَشَٰرِقِ
t: Rabbu alssamawati waalardi wama baynahuma warabbu almashariqi
u: Woh jo zameen aur aasmaano ka aur tamaam un cheezon ka maalik hai jo zameen o aasmaan mein hain, aur saarey mashrikon(easts) ka maalik

ar: إِنَّا زَيَّنَّا ٱلسَّمَآءَ ٱلدُّنۡيَا بِزِينَةٍ ٱلۡكَوَاكِبِ
t: Inna zayyanna alssamaa alddunya bizeenatin alkawakibi
u: Humne aasmaan e duniya ko taaron ki zeenat se aarasta (adorn) kiya hai

ar: وَحِفۡظࣰ ا مِّن كُلِّ شَيۡطَٰنࣲ مَّارِدࣲ‏
t: Wahifthan min kulli shaytanin maridin
u: Aur har shaytan sarkash se isko mehfooz kardiya hai

ar: لَّا يَسَّمَّعُونَ إِلَى ٱلۡمَلَإِ ٱلۡأَعۡلَىٰ وَيُقۡذَفُونَ مِن كُلِّ جَانِبࣲ‏
t: La yassammaAAoona ila almalai alaAAla wayuqthafoona min kulli janibin
u: Yeh shayateen mala-e-aala (High Council) ki baatein nahin sun saktey, har taraf se maarey aur haankey jatey hain

ar: دُحُورࣰ اۖ وَلَهُمۡ عَذَابࣱ وَاصِبٌ
t: Duhooran walahum AAathabun wasibun
u: Aur inke liye paiham azaaab hai

ar: إِلَّا مَنۡ خَطِفَ ٱلۡخَطۡفَةَ فَأَتۡبَعَهُۥ شِهَابࣱ ثَاقِبࣱ‏
t: Illa man khatifa alkhatfata faatbaAAahu shihabun thaqibun
u: Taaham agar koi inmein se kuch ley uday to ek teiz shola uska peecha karta hai

ar: فَٱسۡتَفۡتِهِمۡ أَهُمۡ أَشَدُّ خَلۡقًا أَم مَّنۡ خَلَقۡنَآۚ إِنَّا خَلَقۡنَٰهُم مِّن طِينࣲ لَّازِبِۭ
t: Faistaftihim ahum ashaddu khalqan am man khalaqna inna khalaqnahum min teenin lazibin
u: Ab insey pucho, inki paidaish zyada mushkil hai ya un cheezon ki jo humne paida kar rakkhi hain? Inko to humne leis daar gaaray(sticky clay/chickni mitti) se paida kiya hai

ar: بَلۡ عَجِبۡتَ وَيَسۡخَرُونَ
t: Bal AAajibta wayaskharoona
u: Tum (Allah ki qudrat ke karishmon par) hairan ho aur yeh iska mazaak uda rahey hain

ar: وَإِذَا ذُكِّرُواْ لَا يَذۡكُرُونَ
t: Waitha thukkiroo la yathkuroona
u: Samjhaya jaata hai to samajh kar nahin detey

ar: وَإِذَا رَأَوۡاْ ءَايَةࣰ يَسۡتَسۡخِرُونَ
t: Waitha raaw ayatan yastaskhiroona
u: Koi nishani dekhte hain to usey thatton (mazaak/mock) mein udatey hain

ar: وَقَالُوٓاْ إِنۡ هَٰذَآ إِلَّا سِحۡرࣱ مُّبِينٌ
t: Waqaloo in hatha illa sihrun mubeenun
u: Aur kehte hain “ yeh to sareeh jaadu hai

ar: أَءِذَا مِتۡنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابࣰ ا وَعِظَٰمًا أَءِنَّا لَمَبۡعُوثُونَ
t: Aitha mitna wakunna turaban waAAithaman ainna lamabAAoothoona
u: Bhala kahin aisa ho sakta hai ke jab hum mar chuke hon aur mitti ban jayein aur haddiyon ka panjar reh jaye us waqt hum phir zinda karke utha khade kiye jayein

ar: أَوَءَابَآؤُنَا ٱلۡأَوَّلُونَ
t: Awaabaona alawwaloona
u: Aur kya hamare agle waqton ke aaba o ajdaad bhi uthaye jayenge?”

ar: قُلۡ نَعَمۡ وَأَنتُمۡ دَٰخِرُونَ
t: Qul naAAam waantum dakhiroona
u: (insey kaho haan, aur tum) khuda ke muqable mein baybas ho

ar: فَإِنَّمَا هِيَ زَجۡرَةࣱ وَٰحِدَةࣱ فَإِذَا هُمۡ يَنظُرُونَ
t: Fainnama hiya zajratun wahidatun faitha hum yanthuroona
u: Bas ek hi jhidki hogi aur yakayak yeh apni aankhon se (woh sab kuch jiski khabar di jaa rahi hai) dekh rahey hongey

ar: وَقَالُواْ يَٰوَيۡلَنَا هَٰذَا يَوۡمُ ٱلدِّينِ
t: Waqaloo ya waylana hatha yawmu alddeeni
u: Us waqt yeh kahengey “ haaye hamari kambakhti , yeh to yaum ul jaza hai”

ar: هَٰذَا يَوۡمُ ٱلۡفَصۡلِ ٱلَّذِي كُنتُم بِهِۦ تُكَذِّبُونَ
t: Hatha yawmu alfasli allathee kuntum bihi tukaththiboona
u: “yeh wahi faisley ka din hai jisey tum jhutlaya karte thay”

ar: ۞ٱحۡشُرُواْ ٱلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُواْ وَأَزۡوَٰجَهُمۡ وَمَا كَانُواْ يَعۡبُدُونَ
t: Ohshuroo allatheena thalamoo waazwajahum wama kanoo yaAAbudoona
u: (Hukum hoga) gher lao sab zaalimon aur unke saathiyon aur un maboodon ko jinki woh khuda ko chodh kar bandagi kiya karte thay

ar: مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ فَٱهۡدُوهُمۡ إِلَىٰ صِرَٰطِ ٱلۡجَحِيمِ
t: Min dooni Allahi faihdoohum ila sirati aljaheemi
u: Phir un sab ko jahannum ka raasta dikhao

ar: وَقِفُوهُمۡۖ إِنَّهُم مَّسۡـُٔولُونَ
t: Waqifoohum innahum masooloona
u: Aur zara inhein thehrao, inse kuch puchna hai

ar: مَا لَكُمۡ لَا تَنَاصَرُونَ
t: Ma lakum la tanasaroona
u: “Kya ho gaya tumhein, ab kyun ek dusre ki madad nahin karte

ar: بَلۡ هُمُ ٱلۡيَوۡمَ مُسۡتَسۡلِمُونَ
t: Bal humu alyawma mustaslimoona
u: (Arey, aaj to yeh apne aap ko) aur ek dusre ko hawaliye (surrender) kiye de rahe hain”

ar: وَأَقۡبَلَ بَعۡضُهُمۡ عَلَىٰ بَعۡضࣲ يَتَسَآءَلُونَ
t: Waaqbala baAAduhum AAala baAAdin yatasaaloona
u: Iske baad yeh ek dusre ki taraf mudenge aur baham takrar shuru kar dengey

ar: قَالُوٓاْ إِنَّكُمۡ كُنتُمۡ تَأۡتُونَنَا عَنِ ٱلۡيَمِينِ
t: Qaloo innakum kuntum tatoonana AAani alyameeni
u: pairvi karne waley apne peshwaon[leaders] se) kahenge, “Tum hamare paas seedhay rukh se aate thay”

ar: قَالُواْ بَل لَّمۡ تَكُونُواْ مُؤۡمِنِينَ
t: Qaloo bal lam takoonoo mumineena
u: Woh jawaab dengey “nahin balke tum khud iman laney waley na thay

ar: وَمَا كَانَ لَنَا عَلَيۡكُم مِّن سُلۡطَٰنِۭۖ بَلۡ كُنتُمۡ قَوۡمࣰ ا طَٰغِينَ
t: Wama kana lana AAalaykum min sultanin bal kuntum qawman tagheena
u: Hamara tumpar koi zoar na tha, tum khud hi sarkash log thay

ar: فَحَقَّ عَلَيۡنَا قَوۡلُ رَبِّنَآۖ إِنَّا لَذَآئِقُونَ
t: Fahaqqa AAalayna qawlu rabbina inna lathaiqoona
u: Aakhir e kaar hum apne Rubb ke is farmaan ke mustahiq ho gaye ke hum azaab ka maza chakhne waley hain

ar: فَأَغۡوَيۡنَٰكُمۡ إِنَّا كُنَّا غَٰوِينَ
t: Faaghwaynakum inna kunna ghaweena
u: So humne tumko behkaya, hum khud behke huye thay”

ar: فَإِنَّهُمۡ يَوۡمَئِذࣲ فِي ٱلۡعَذَابِ مُشۡتَرِكُونَ
t: Fainnahum yawmaithin fee alAAathabi mushtarikoona
u: Is taraah woh sab us roz azaab mein mushtarik (shareek) hongey

ar: إِنَّا كَذَٰلِكَ نَفۡعَلُ بِٱلۡمُجۡرِمِينَ
t: Inna kathalika nafAAalu bialmujrimeena
u: Hum mujreemon ke saath yahi kuch kiya karte hain

ar: إِنَّهُمۡ كَانُوٓاْ إِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمۡ لَآ إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا ٱللَّهُ يَسۡتَكۡبِرُونَ
t: Innahum kanoo itha qeela lahum la ilaha illa Allahu yastakbiroona
u: Yeh woh log thay ke jab unsey kaha jata “Allah ke siwa koi maabood e barhaqq nahin hai” to yeh ghamand mein aa jatey thay

ar: وَيَقُولُونَ أَئِنَّا لَتَارِكُوٓاْ ءَالِهَتِنَا لِشَاعِرࣲ مَّجۡنُونِۭ
t: Wayaqooloona ainna latarikoo alihatina lishaAAirin majnoonin
u: Aur kehte thay “kya hum ek shayar majnoon (dewane) ki khaatir apne maboodon ko chodh dein?”

ar: بَلۡ جَآءَ بِٱلۡحَقِّ وَصَدَّقَ ٱلۡمُرۡسَلِينَ
t: Bal jaa bialhaqqi wasaddaqa almursaleena
u: Halaanke woh haqq lekar aaya tha aur usne Rasoolon ki tasdeeq ki thi

ar: إِنَّكُمۡ لَذَآئِقُواْ ٱلۡعَذَابِ ٱلۡأَلِيمِ
t: Innakum lathaiqoo alAAathabi alaleemi
u: (Ab unse kaha jayega ke) tum laaziman dardnaak saza ka maza chakhne waley ho

ar: وَمَا تُجۡزَوۡنَ إِلَّا مَا كُنتُمۡ تَعۡمَلُونَ
t: Wama tujzawna illa ma kuntum taAAmaloona
u: Aur tumhein jo badla bhi diya jaa raha hai unhi aamaal ka diya ja raha hai jo tum karte rahey ho

ar: إِلَّا عِبَادَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلۡمُخۡلَصِينَ
t: Illa AAibada Allahi almukhlaseena
u: Magar Allah ke cheeda (chune huey/chosen) banday (is anjaam e badd se) mehfooz hongey

ar: أُوْلَٰٓئِكَ لَهُمۡ رِزۡقࣱ مَّعۡلُومࣱ‏
t: Olaika lahum rizqun maAAloomun
u: Unke liye jaana bujha rizq (known provision) hai

ar: فَوَٰكِهُ وَهُم مُّكۡرَمُونَ
t: Fawakihu wahum mukramoona
u: Har tarah ki lazeez cheezein

ar: فِي جَنَّٰتِ ٱلنَّعِيمِ
t: Fee jannati alnnaAAeemi
u: Aur niyamat bhari jannatein

ar: عَلَىٰ سُرُرࣲ مُّتَقَٰبِلِينَ
t: AAala sururin mutaqabileena
u: Jinmein woh izzat ke saath rakkhey jayenge, takhaton par aamne saamne baithenge

ar: يُطَافُ عَلَيۡهِم بِكَأۡسࣲ مِّن مَّعِينِۭ
t: Yutafu AAalayhim bikasin min maAAeenin
u: Sharaab ke chamson (springs) se sagar (cups) bhar bhar kar unke darmiyan phiraye jayenge

ar: بَيۡضَآءَ لَذَّةࣲ لِّلشَّٰرِبِينَ
t: Baydaa laththatin lilshsharibeena
u: Chamakti hui sharaab, jo peene waalon ke liye lazzat hogi

ar: لَا فِيهَا غَوۡلࣱ وَلَا هُمۡ عَنۡهَا يُنزَفُونَ
t: La feeha ghawlun wala hum AAanha yunzafoona
u: Na unke jism ko ussey koi zarar hoga aur na unki aqal ussey kharab hogi

ar: وَعِندَهُمۡ قَٰصِرَٰتُ ٱلطَّرۡفِ عِينࣱ‏
t: WaAAindahum qasiratu alttarfi AAeenun
u: Aur unke paas nigahein bachane wali, khoobsurat aankhon wali auratein hongi

ar: كَأَنَّهُنَّ بَيۡضࣱ مَّكۡنُونࣱ‏
t: Kaannahunna baydun maknoonun
u: Aisi naazuk jaise andey (egg) ke chilke ke nichey chupi hui jhilli

ar: فَأَقۡبَلَ بَعۡضُهُمۡ عَلَىٰ بَعۡضࣲ يَتَسَآءَلُونَ
t: Faaqbala baAAduhum AAala baAAdin yatasaaloona
u: Phir woh ek dusre ki taraf mutawajjeh ho kar halaat puchengey

ar: قَالَ قَآئِلࣱ مِّنۡهُمۡ إِنِّي كَانَ لِي قَرِينࣱ‏
t: Qala qailun minhum innee kana lee qareenun
u: Unmein se ek kahega, “duniya mein mera ek hum nahseen (companion) tha

ar: يَقُولُ أَءِنَّكَ لَمِنَ ٱلۡمُصَدِّقِينَ
t: Yaqoolu ainnaka lamina almusaddiqeena
u: Jo mujhse kaha karta tha, kya tum bhi tasdeeq karne walon mein se ho

ar: أَءِذَا مِتۡنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابࣰ ا وَعِظَٰمًا أَءِنَّا لَمَدِينُونَ
t: Aitha mitna wakunna turaban waAAithaman ainna lamadeenoona
u: Kya waqayi jab hum mar chuke hongey aur mitti ho jayenge aur haddiyon ka panjar bankar reh jayenge to humein jaza o saza di jayegi

ar: قَالَ هَلۡ أَنتُم مُّطَّلِعُونَ
t: Qala hal antum muttaliAAoona
u: Ab kya aap log dekhna chahte hain ke woh sahib ab kahan hain?”

ar: فَٱطَّلَعَ فَرَءَاهُ فِي سَوَآءِ ٱلۡجَحِيمِ
t: FaittalaAAa faraahu fee sawai aljaheemi
u: Yeh keh kar junhi woh jhukega to jahannum ki gehrayi mein usko dekh lega

ar: قَالَ تَٱللَّهِ إِن كِدتَّ لَتُرۡدِينِ
t: Qala taAllahi in kidta laturdeeni
u: Aur ussey khitaab karke kahega “khuda ki kasam, tu to mujhey tabaah hi kar dene wala tha

ar: وَلَوۡلَا نِعۡمَةُ رَبِّي لَكُنتُ مِنَ ٱلۡمُحۡضَرِينَ
t: Walawla niAAmatu rabbee lakuntu mina almuhdareena
u: Mere Rubb ka fazal shamil e haal na hota to aaj main bhi un logon mein se hota jo pakde huey aaye hain

ar: أَفَمَا نَحۡنُ بِمَيِّتِينَ
t: Afama nahnu bimayyiteena
u: Accha to kya ab hum marne waley nahin hain

ar: إِلَّا مَوۡتَتَنَا ٱلۡأُولَىٰ وَمَا نَحۡنُ بِمُعَذَّبِينَ
t: Illa mawtatana aloola wama nahnu bimuAAaththabeena
u: Maut jo humein aani thi woh bas pehle aa chuki? Ab humein koi azaab nahin hona?”

ar: إِنَّ هَٰذَا لَهُوَ ٱلۡفَوۡزُ ٱلۡعَظِيمُ
t: Inna hatha lahuwa alfawzu alAAatheemu
u: Yakeenan yahi azeem o shaan kaamiyabi hai

ar: لِمِثۡلِ هَٰذَا فَلۡيَعۡمَلِ ٱلۡعَٰمِلُونَ
t: Limithli hatha falyaAAmali alAAamiloona
u: Aisi hi kamiyabi ke liye amal karne walon ko amal karna chahiye

ar: أَذَٰلِكَ خَيۡرࣱ نُّزُلًا أَمۡ شَجَرَةُ ٱلزَّقُّومِ
t: Athalika khayrun nuzulan am shajaratu alzzaqqoomi
u: Bolo, yeh ziyafat acchi hai ya zakkhum ka darakht

ar: إِنَّا جَعَلۡنَٰهَا فِتۡنَةࣰ لِّلظَّٰلِمِينَ
t: Inna jaAAalnaha fitnatan lilththalimeena
u: Humne us darakht ko zaalimon ke liye fitna bana diya hai

ar: إِنَّهَا شَجَرَةࣱ تَخۡرُجُ فِيٓ أَصۡلِ ٱلۡجَحِيمِ
t: Innaha shajaratun takhruju fee asli aljaheemi
u: Woh ek darakht hai jo jahannum ki teh se nikalta hai

ar: طَلۡعُهَا كَأَنَّهُۥ رُءُوسُ ٱلشَّيَٰطِينِ
t: TalAAuha kaannahu ruoosu alshshayateeni
u: Uske shagufe (emerging fruit) aise hain jaise shaytano ke sar

ar: فَإِنَّهُمۡ لَأٓكِلُونَ مِنۡهَا فَمَالِـُٔونَ مِنۡهَا ٱلۡبُطُونَ
t: Fainnahum laakiloona minha famalioona minha albutoona
u: Jahannum ke log usey khayenge aur usi se pait bharengey

ar: ثُمَّ إِنَّ لَهُمۡ عَلَيۡهَا لَشَوۡبࣰ ا مِّنۡ حَمِيمࣲ‏
t: Thumma inna lahum AAalayha lashawban min hameemin
u: Phir ispar peene ke liye khaulta hua pani milega

ar: ثُمَّ إِنَّ مَرۡجِعَهُمۡ لَإِلَى ٱلۡجَحِيمِ
t: Thumma inna marjiAAahum laila aljaheemi
u: Aur iske baad unki wapsi usi aatish e dozakh (blazing Hell) ki taraf hogi

ar: إِنَّهُمۡ أَلۡفَوۡاْ ءَابَآءَهُمۡ ضَآلِّينَ
t: Innahum alfaw abaahum dalleena
u: Yeh woh log hain jinhon ne apne baap dada ko gumraah paya

ar: فَهُمۡ عَلَىٰٓ ءَاثَٰرِهِمۡ يُهۡرَعُونَ
t: Fahum AAala atharihim yuhraAAoona
u: Aur unhi ke nakshe qadam par daud chale

ar: وَلَقَدۡ ضَلَّ قَبۡلَهُمۡ أَكۡثَرُ ٱلۡأَوَّلِينَ
t: Walaqad dalla qablahum aktharu alawwaleena
u: Halaanke unse pehle bahut se log gumraah ho chuke thay

ar: وَلَقَدۡ أَرۡسَلۡنَا فِيهِم مُّنذِرِينَ
t: Walaqad arsalna feehim munthireena
u: Aur unmein humne tambeeh (warn) karne walay Rasool bheje thay

ar: فَٱنظُرۡ كَيۡفَ كَانَ عَٰقِبَةُ ٱلۡمُنذَرِينَ
t: Faonthur kayfa kana AAaqibatu almunthareena
u: Ab dekhlo ke un tambeeh kiye janey walon ka kya anjaam hua

ar: إِلَّا عِبَادَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلۡمُخۡلَصِينَ
t: Illa AAibada Allahi almukhlaseena
u: Is bad-anjaami se bas Allah ke wahi banday bachay hain jinhein usne apne liye khalis karliya hai

ar: وَلَقَدۡ نَادَىٰنَا نُوحࣱ فَلَنِعۡمَ ٱلۡمُجِيبُونَ
t: Walaqad nadana noohun falaniAAma almujeeboona
u: Humko (issey pehle) Nooh ne pukara tha, to dekho ke hum kaise acche jawab dene waley thay

ar: وَنَجَّيۡنَٰهُ وَأَهۡلَهُۥ مِنَ ٱلۡكَرۡبِ ٱلۡعَظِيمِ
t: Wanajjaynahu waahlahu mina alkarbi alAAatheemi
u: Humne usko aur uske ghar walon ko karb-e-azeem (badi musibat) se bacha liya

ar: وَجَعَلۡنَا ذُرِّيَّتَهُۥ هُمُ ٱلۡبَاقِينَ
t: WajaAAalna thurriyyatahu humu albaqeena
u: Aur usi ki nasal ko baaki rakkha

ar: وَتَرَكۡنَا عَلَيۡهِ فِي ٱلۡأٓخِرِينَ
t: Watarakna AAalayhi fee alakhireena
u: Aur baad ki nasalon mein iski taarif o tausif chodh di

ar: سَلَٰمٌ عَلَىٰ نُوحࣲ فِي ٱلۡعَٰلَمِينَ
t: Salamun AAala noohin fee alAAalameena
u: Salaam hai Nooh par tamaam duniya walon mein

ar: إِنَّا كَذَٰلِكَ نَجۡزِي ٱلۡمُحۡسِنِينَ
t: Inna kathalika najzee almuhsineena
u: Hum neki karne walon ko aisi hi jaza diya karte hain

ar: إِنَّهُۥ مِنۡ عِبَادِنَا ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ
t: Innahu min AAibadina almumineena
u: Dar haqeeqat woh hamare momin bandon mein se tha

ar: ثُمَّ أَغۡرَقۡنَا ٱلۡأٓخَرِينَ
t: Thumma aghraqna alakhareena
u: Phir dusre giroh ko humne garq (drown) kardiya

ar: ۞وَإِنَّ مِن شِيعَتِهِۦ لَإِبۡرَٰهِيمَ
t: Wainna min sheeAAatihi laibraheema
u: Aur Nooh hi ke tareeqey par chalne wala Ibrahim tha

ar: إِذۡ جَآءَ رَبَّهُۥ بِقَلۡبࣲ سَلِيمٍ
t: Ith jaa rabbahu biqalbin saleemin
u: Jab woh apne Rubb ke huzur qalb e saleem lekar aaya

ar: إِذۡ قَالَ لِأَبِيهِ وَقَوۡمِهِۦ مَاذَا تَعۡبُدُونَ
t: Ith qala liabeehi waqawmihi matha taAAbudoona
u: Jab usne apne baap aur apni qaum se kaha “yeh kya cheezein hain jinki tum ibadat kar rahey ho

ar: أَئِفۡكًا ءَالِهَةࣰ دُونَ ٱللَّهِ تُرِيدُونَ
t: Aifkan alihatan doona Allahi tureedoona
u: Kya Allah ko chodh kar jhoot ghadey huey maabood chahte ho

ar: فَمَا ظَنُّكُم بِرَبِّ ٱلۡعَٰلَمِينَ
t: Fama thannukum birabbi alAAalameena
u: Aakhir Allah Rubb-ul-Aalameen ke baarey mein tumhara kya gumaan hai?”

ar: فَنَظَرَ نَظۡرَةࣰ فِي ٱلنُّجُومِ
t: Fanathara nathratan fee alnnujoomi
u: Phir usne taaron par ek nigaah daali

ar: فَقَالَ إِنِّي سَقِيمࣱ‏
t: Faqala innee saqeemun
u: Aur kaha meri tabiyat kharaab hai

ar: فَتَوَلَّوۡاْ عَنۡهُ مُدۡبِرِينَ
t: Fatawallaw AAanhu mudbireena
u: Chunanche woh log usey chodh kar chale gaye

ar: فَرَاغَ إِلَىٰٓ ءَالِهَتِهِمۡ فَقَالَ أَلَا تَأۡكُلُونَ
t: Faragha ila alihatihim faqala ala takuloona
u: Unke peechey woh chupke se unke maboodon ke mandir mein ghus gaya aur bola “aap log khate kyun nahin hain

ar: مَا لَكُمۡ لَا تَنطِقُونَ
t: Ma lakum la tantiqoona
u: Kya ho gaya, aap log bolte bhi nahin?”

ar: فَرَاغَ عَلَيۡهِمۡ ضَرۡبَۢا بِٱلۡيَمِينِ
t: Faragha AAalayhim darban bialyameeni
u: Iske baad woh unpar pil (toot) pada aur seedhay haath se khoob zarbein lagayi (todhna shuru kiya)

ar: فَأَقۡبَلُوٓاْ إِلَيۡهِ يَزِفُّونَ
t: Faaqbaloo ilayhi yaziffoona
u: (Wapas aakar) woh log bhaage bhaage uske paas aaye

ar: قَالَ أَتَعۡبُدُونَ مَا تَنۡحِتُونَ
t: Qala ataAAbudoona ma tanhitoona
u: Usne kaha “kya tum apni hi tarashi hui cheezon ko poojhte ho

ar: وَٱللَّهُ خَلَقَكُمۡ وَمَا تَعۡمَلُونَ
t: WaAllahu khalaqakum wama taAAmaloona
u: Halaanke Allah hi ne tumko bhi paida kiya hai aur un cheezon ko bhi jinhein tum banatey ho”

ar: قَالُواْ ٱبۡنُواْ لَهُۥ بُنۡيَٰنࣰ ا فَأَلۡقُوهُ فِي ٱلۡجَحِيمِ
t: Qaloo ibnoo lahu bunyanan faalqoohu fee aljaheemi
u: Unhon ne aapas mein kaha “ iske liya ek alaaw (pyre) tayyar karo aur isey dehakti hui aag ke dhair mein phenk do”

ar: فَأَرَادُواْ بِهِۦ كَيۡدࣰ ا فَجَعَلۡنَٰهُمُ ٱلۡأَسۡفَلِينَ
t: Faaradoo bihi kaydan fajaAAalnahumu alasfaleena
u: Unhon ne uske khilaf ek karawayi karna chahi thi, magar humne unhi ko nicha dikha diya

ar: وَقَالَ إِنِّي ذَاهِبٌ إِلَىٰ رَبِّي سَيَهۡدِينِ
t: Waqala innee thahibun ila rabbee sayahdeeni
u: Ibrahim ne kaha “ main apne Rubb ki taraf jata hoon, wahi meri rehnumayi karega

ar: رَبِّ هَبۡ لِي مِنَ ٱلصَّٰلِحِينَ
t: Rabbi hab lee mina alssaliheena
u: Aey parwardigar , mujhey ek beta ata kar jo salihon (righteous) mein se ho”

ar: فَبَشَّرۡنَٰهُ بِغُلَٰمٍ حَلِيمࣲ‏
t: Fabashsharnahu bighulamin haleemin
u: (Is dua ke jawab mein)humne usko ek haleem (burdbaar) ladke ki basharat di

ar: فَلَمَّا بَلَغَ مَعَهُ ٱلسَّعۡيَ قَالَ يَٰبُنَيَّ إِنِّيٓ أَرَىٰ فِي ٱلۡمَنَامِ أَنِّيٓ أَذۡبَحُكَ فَٱنظُرۡ مَاذَا تَرَىٰۚ قَالَ يَٰٓأَبَتِ ٱفۡعَلۡ مَا تُؤۡمَرُۖ سَتَجِدُنِيٓ إِن شَآءَ ٱللَّهُ مِنَ ٱلصَّٰبِرِينَ
t: Falamma balagha maAAahu alssaAAya qala ya bunayya innee ara fee almanami annee athbahuka faonthur matha tara qala ya abati ifAAal ma tumaru satajidunee in shaa Allahu mina alssabireena
u: Woh ladka jab uske saath daud dhoop karne ki umar ko pahunch gaya to ( ek roz) Ibrahim ne ussey kaha, “beta, main khwab mein dekhta hoon ke main tujhey zibaah kar raha hoon, ab tu bata, tera kya khayal hai?” usne kaha, “abbajan , jo kuch aapko hukum diya jaa raha hai usey kar daliye, aap insha Allah mujhey saabiron(sabr karne walon) mein se payenge”

ar: فَلَمَّآ أَسۡلَمَا وَتَلَّهُۥ لِلۡجَبِينِ
t: Falamma aslama watallahu liljabeeni
u: Aakhir ko jab in dono ne sar-e-tasleem kham kardiya aur Ibrahim ne bete ko maathay ke bal gira diya

ar: وَنَٰدَيۡنَٰهُ أَن يَٰٓإِبۡرَٰهِيمُ
t: Wanadaynahu an ya ibraheemu
u: Aur humne nida di ke “Aey Ibrahim

ar: قَدۡ صَدَّقۡتَ ٱلرُّءۡيَآۚ إِنَّا كَذَٰلِكَ نَجۡزِي ٱلۡمُحۡسِنِينَ
t: Qad saddaqta alrruya inna kathalika najzee almuhsineena
u: Tu nay khwab sach kar dikhaya hum neki karne walon ko aisi hi jaza deta hain

ar: إِنَّ هَٰذَا لَهُوَ ٱلۡبَلَٰٓؤُاْ ٱلۡمُبِينُ
t: Inna hatha lahuwa albalao almubeenu
u: Yaqeenan yeh ek khuli aazmaaish thi”

ar: وَفَدَيۡنَٰهُ بِذِبۡحٍ عَظِيمࣲ‏
t: Wafadaynahu bithibhin AAatheemin
u: Aur humne ek badi qurbani fidiye mein de kar us bacchey ko chuda liya

ar: وَتَرَكۡنَا عَلَيۡهِ فِي ٱلۡأٓخِرِينَ
t: Watarakna AAalayhi fee alakhireena
u: Aur uski taarif o tauseef hamesha ke liye baad ki nasalon mein chodh di

ar: سَلَٰمٌ عَلَىٰٓ إِبۡرَٰهِيمَ
t: Salamun AAala ibraheema
u: Salaam hai Ibrahim par

ar: كَذَٰلِكَ نَجۡزِي ٱلۡمُحۡسِنِينَ
t: Kathalika najzee almuhsineena
u: Hum neki karne waalon ko aisi hi jaza detay hain

ar: إِنَّهُۥ مِنۡ عِبَادِنَا ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ
t: Innahu min AAibadina almumineena
u: Yaqeenan woh hamare momin bandon mein se tha

ar: وَبَشَّرۡنَٰهُ بِإِسۡحَٰقَ نَبِيࣰّ ا مِّنَ ٱلصَّٰلِحِينَ
t: Wabashsharnahu biishaqa nabiyyan mina alssaliheena
u: Aur humne usey Ishaq(Issac) ki basharat di , ek Nabi saliheen mein se

ar: وَبَٰرَكۡنَا عَلَيۡهِ وَعَلَىٰٓ إِسۡحَٰقَۚ وَمِن ذُرِّيَّتِهِمَا مُحۡسِنࣱ وَظَالِمࣱ لِّنَفۡسِهِۦ مُبِينࣱ‏
t: Wabarakna AAalayhi waAAala ishaqa wamin thurriyyatihima muhsinun wathalimun linafsihi mubeenun
u: Aur usey aur Ishaq ko barakat di. Ab in dono ki zurriyat mein se koi mohsin hai aur koi apne nafs par sareeh zulm karne wala hai

ar: وَلَقَدۡ مَنَنَّا عَلَىٰ مُوسَىٰ وَهَٰرُونَ
t: Walaqad mananna AAala moosa waharoona
u: Aur humne Moosa o Haroon par ehsan kiya

ar: وَنَجَّيۡنَٰهُمَا وَقَوۡمَهُمَا مِنَ ٱلۡكَرۡبِ ٱلۡعَظِيمِ
t: Wanajjaynahuma waqawmahuma mina alkarbi alAAatheemi
u: Unko aur unki qaum ko karb-e-azeem( badi museebat) se nijaat di

ar: وَنَصَرۡنَٰهُمۡ فَكَانُواْ هُمُ ٱلۡغَٰلِبِينَ
t: Wanasarnahum fakanoo humu alghalibeena
u: Unhein nusrat bakshi jiski wajah se wahi galib rahey

ar: وَءَاتَيۡنَٰهُمَا ٱلۡكِتَٰبَ ٱلۡمُسۡتَبِينَ
t: Waataynahuma alkitaba almustabeena
u: Unko nihayat wazeh kitaab ata ki

ar: وَهَدَيۡنَٰهُمَا ٱلصِّرَٰطَ ٱلۡمُسۡتَقِيمَ
t: Wahadaynahuma alssirata almustaqeema
u: Unhein raah-e-raast dikhayi

ar: وَتَرَكۡنَا عَلَيۡهِمَا فِي ٱلۡأٓخِرِينَ
t: Watarakna AAalayhima fee alakhireena
u: Aur baad ki nasalon mein unka zikr e khair baaqi rakkha

ar: سَلَٰمٌ عَلَىٰ مُوسَىٰ وَهَٰرُونَ
t: Salamun AAala moosa waharoona
u: Salaam hai Mossa aur Haroon par

ar: إِنَّا كَذَٰلِكَ نَجۡزِي ٱلۡمُحۡسِنِينَ
t: Inna kathalika najzee almuhsineena
u: Hum neki karne walon ko aisi hi jaza detay hain

ar: إِنَّهُمَا مِنۡ عِبَادِنَا ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ
t: Innahuma min AAibadina almumineena
u: Dar haqeeqat woh hamare momin bandon mein se thay

ar: وَإِنَّ إِلۡيَاسَ لَمِنَ ٱلۡمُرۡسَلِينَ
t: Wainna ilyasa lamina almursaleena
u: Aur Ilyas bhi yaqeenan mursaleen(messengers) mein se tha

ar: إِذۡ قَالَ لِقَوۡمِهِۦٓ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
t: Ith qala liqawmihi ala tattaqoona
u: Yaad karo jab usne apni qaum se kaha tha ke “tum log darte nahin ho

ar: أَتَدۡعُونَ بَعۡلࣰ ا وَتَذَرُونَ أَحۡسَنَ ٱلۡخَٰلِقِينَ
t: AtadAAoona baAAlan watatharoona ahsana alkhaliqeena
u: Kya tum BAAL ko pukarte ho aur ahsanul khaliqeen ko chodh dete ho

ar: ٱللَّهَ رَبَّكُمۡ وَرَبَّ ءَابَآئِكُمُ ٱلۡأَوَّلِينَ
t: Allaha rabbakum warabba abaikumu alawwaleena
u: Us Allah ko jo tumhara aur tumhare agle pichle aaba o ajdaad ka Rubb hai?”

ar: فَكَذَّبُوهُ فَإِنَّهُمۡ لَمُحۡضَرُونَ
t: Fakaththaboohu fainnahum lamuhdaroona
u: Magar unhon ne usey jhutla diya, so ab yaqeenan woh saza ke liye pesh kiye janey waley hain

ar: إِلَّا عِبَادَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلۡمُخۡلَصِينَ
t: Illa AAibada Allahi almukhlaseena
u: Bajuz un bandagaan e khuda ke jinko khaalis karliya gaya tha

ar: وَتَرَكۡنَا عَلَيۡهِ فِي ٱلۡأٓخِرِينَ
t: Watarakna AAalayhi fee alakhireena
u: Aur Ilyas ka zikr e khair humne baad ki nasalon mein baaki rakkha

ar: سَلَٰمٌ عَلَىٰٓ إِلۡ يَاسِينَ
t: Salamun AAala il yaseena
u: Salaam hai Ilyas par

ar: إِنَّا كَذَٰلِكَ نَجۡزِي ٱلۡمُحۡسِنِينَ
t: Inna kathalika najzee almuhsineena
u: Hum neki karne walon ko aisi hi jaza dete hain

ar: إِنَّهُۥ مِنۡ عِبَادِنَا ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ
t: Innahu min AAibadina almumineena
u: Waqayi wo hamare momin bandon mein se tha

ar: وَإِنَّ لُوطࣰ ا لَّمِنَ ٱلۡمُرۡسَلِينَ
t: Wainna lootan lamina almursaleena
u: Aur Lut bhi unhi logon mein se tha jo Rasool bana kar bheje gaye hain

ar: إِذۡ نَجَّيۡنَٰهُ وَأَهۡلَهُۥٓ أَجۡمَعِينَ
t: Ith najjaynahu waahlahu ajmaAAeena
u: Yaad karo jab humne usko aur uske sab gar walon ko nijaat di

ar: إِلَّا عَجُوزࣰ ا فِي ٱلۡغَٰبِرِينَ
t: Illa AAajoozan fee alghabireena
u: Siwaye ek budiya ke jo peechey reh janey walon mein se thi

ar: ثُمَّ دَمَّرۡنَا ٱلۡأٓخَرِينَ
t: Thumma dammarna alakhareena
u: Phir baaki sabko tehas nehas kardiya

ar: وَإِنَّكُمۡ لَتَمُرُّونَ عَلَيۡهِم مُّصۡبِحِينَ
t: Wainnakum latamurroona AAalayhim musbiheena
u: Aaj tum shab-o-roz unke ujday dayar (desolate habitations) par se guzarte ho

ar: وَبِٱلَّيۡلِۚ أَفَلَا تَعۡقِلُونَ
t: Wabiallayli afala taAAqiloona
u: Kya tumko aqal nahin aati

ar: وَإِنَّ يُونُسَ لَمِنَ ٱلۡمُرۡسَلِينَ
t: Wainna yoonusa lamina almursaleena
u: Aur yaqeenan Yunus bhi Rasoolon mein se tha

ar: إِذۡ أَبَقَ إِلَى ٱلۡفُلۡكِ ٱلۡمَشۡحُونِ
t: Ith abaqa ila alfulki almashhooni
u: Yaad karo jab woh ek bhari kashti ki taraf bhaag nikla

ar: فَسَاهَمَ فَكَانَ مِنَ ٱلۡمُدۡحَضِينَ
t: Fasahama fakana mina almudhadeena
u: Phir quora andazi (cast lots) mein shareek hua aur usmein maath khayi (among the losers)

ar: فَٱلۡتَقَمَهُ ٱلۡحُوتُ وَهُوَ مُلِيمࣱ‏
t: Failtaqamahu alhootu wahuwa muleemun
u: Aakhir e kaar machli ne usey nigal liya aur woh malamat zada tha

ar: فَلَوۡلَآ أَنَّهُۥ كَانَ مِنَ ٱلۡمُسَبِّحِينَ
t: Falawla annahu kana mina almusabbiheena
u: Ab agar woh tasbeeh karne walon mein se na hota to

ar: لَلَبِثَ فِي بَطۡنِهِۦٓ إِلَىٰ يَوۡمِ يُبۡعَثُونَ
t: Lalabitha fee batnihi ila yawmi yubAAathoona
u: Roz-e-qayamat tak usi machli ke pait mein rehta

ar: ۞فَنَبَذۡنَٰهُ بِٱلۡعَرَآءِ وَهُوَ سَقِيمࣱ‏
t: Fanabathnahu bialAAarai wahuwa saqeemun
u: Aakhir humne usey badi sakheem (bimar /ill) halat mein ek chatiyal zameen par phenk diya

ar: وَأَنۢبَتۡنَا عَلَيۡهِ شَجَرَةࣰ مِّن يَقۡطِينࣲ‏
t: Waanbatna AAalayhi shajaratan min yaqteenin
u: Aur uspar ek bail-daar darakht (a spreading plant of the gourd kind) uga diya

ar: وَأَرۡسَلۡنَٰهُ إِلَىٰ مِاْئَةِ أَلۡفٍ أَوۡ يَزِيدُونَ
t: Waarsalnahu ila miati alfin aw yazeedoona
u: Iske baad humne usey ek lakh ya us sey zayad logon ki taraf bheja

ar: فَـَٔامَنُواْ فَمَتَّعۡنَٰهُمۡ إِلَىٰ حِينࣲ‏
t: Faamanoo famattaAAnahum ila heenin
u: Woh imaan laye aur humne ek waqt e khaas tak unhein baaqi rakkha

ar: فَٱسۡتَفۡتِهِمۡ أَلِرَبِّكَ ٱلۡبَنَاتُ وَلَهُمُ ٱلۡبَنُونَ
t: Faistaftihim alirabbika albanatu walahumu albanoona
u: Phir zara in logon se pucho, kya (inke dil ko yeh baat lagti hai ke) tumhare Rubb ke liye to hon betiyan aur inke liye hon betay

ar: أَمۡ خَلَقۡنَا ٱلۡمَلَٰٓئِكَةَ إِنَٰثࣰ ا وَهُمۡ شَٰهِدُونَ
t: Am khalaqna almalaikata inathan wahum shahidoona
u: Kya waqayi humne malaika (farishton) ko auratein banaya hai aur yeh aankhon dekhi baat keh rahey hain

ar: أَلَآ إِنَّهُم مِّنۡ إِفۡكِهِمۡ لَيَقُولُونَ
t: Ala innahum min ifkihim layaqooloona
u: Khoob sun rakkho, dar-asal yeh log apni mann ghadat se yeh baat kehte hain

ar: وَلَدَ ٱللَّهُ وَإِنَّهُمۡ لَكَٰذِبُونَ
t: Walada Allahu wainnahum lakathiboona
u: Ke Allah aulad rakhta hai, aur fil waqayi yeh jhootey hain

ar: أَصۡطَفَى ٱلۡبَنَاتِ عَلَى ٱلۡبَنِينَ
t: Astafa albanati AAala albaneena
u: Kya Allah ne beton ke bajaye betiyan apne liye pasand karli

ar: مَا لَكُمۡ كَيۡفَ تَحۡكُمُونَ
t: Ma lakum kayfa tahkumoona
u: Tumhein kya ho gaya hai, kaise hukum laga rahey ho

ar: أَفَلَا تَذَكَّرُونَ
t: Afala tathakkaroona
u: Kya tumhein hosh nahin aata

ar: أَمۡ لَكُمۡ سُلۡطَٰنࣱ مُّبِينࣱ‏
t: Am lakum sultanun mubeenun
u: Ya phir tumhare paas apni in baaton ke liye koi saaf sanad (daleel) hai

ar: فَأۡتُواْ بِكِتَٰبِكُمۡ إِن كُنتُمۡ صَٰدِقِينَ
t: Fatoo bikitabikum in kuntum sadiqeena
u: To lao apni woh kitaab agar tum sachhey ho

ar: وَجَعَلُواْ بَيۡنَهُۥ وَبَيۡنَ ٱلۡجِنَّةِ نَسَبࣰ اۚ وَلَقَدۡ عَلِمَتِ ٱلۡجِنَّةُ إِنَّهُمۡ لَمُحۡضَرُونَ
t: WajaAAaloo baynahu wabayna aljinnati nasaban walaqad AAalimati aljinnatu innahum lamuhdaroona
u: Inhon ne Allah aur malaika ke darmiyan nasab (kinship)ka rishta bana rakkha hai, halanke malaika khoob jaante hain ke yeh log mujrim ki haisiyat se pesh honay waley hain

ar: سُبۡحَٰنَ ٱللَّهِ عَمَّا يَصِفُونَ
t: Subhana Allahi AAamma yasifoona
u: (aur woh kehte hain ke) “Allah un sifaat se paak hai

ar: إِلَّا عِبَادَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلۡمُخۡلَصِينَ
t: Illa AAibada Allahi almukhlaseena
u: Jo uske khaalis bandon ke siwa dusre log uski taraf mansoob karte hain

ar: فَإِنَّكُمۡ وَمَا تَعۡبُدُونَ
t: Fainnakum wama taAAbudoona
u: Pas tum aur tumhare yeh mabood

ar: مَآ أَنتُمۡ عَلَيۡهِ بِفَٰتِنِينَ
t: Ma antum AAalayhi bifatineena
u: Allah se kisi ko pher nahin sakte

ar: إِلَّا مَنۡ هُوَ صَالِ ٱلۡجَحِيمِ
t: Illa man huwa sali aljaheemi
u: Magar sifr usko jo dozakh ki bhadakti hui aag mein jhulasne wala ho

ar: وَمَا مِنَّآ إِلَّا لَهُۥ مَقَامࣱ مَّعۡلُومࣱ‏
t: Wama minna illa lahu maqamun maAAloomun
u: Aur hamara haal to yeh hai ke hum mein se har ek ka ek muqaam mukarrar hai

ar: وَإِنَّا لَنَحۡنُ ٱلصَّآفُّونَ
t: Wainna lanahnu alssaffoona
u: Aur hum saff basta (in rows) khidmatgaar hain

ar: وَإِنَّا لَنَحۡنُ ٱلۡمُسَبِّحُونَ
t: Wainna lanahnu almusabbihoona
u: Tasbeeh karne waley hain.”

ar: وَإِن كَانُواْ لَيَقُولُونَ
t: Wain kanoo layaqooloona
u: Yeh log pehle to kaha karte thay

ar: لَوۡ أَنَّ عِندَنَا ذِكۡرࣰ ا مِّنَ ٱلۡأَوَّلِينَ
t: Law anna AAindana thikran mina alawwaleena
u: Ke kaash hamare paas woh “Zikr” hota jo pichli qaumon ko mila tha

ar: لَكُنَّا عِبَادَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلۡمُخۡلَصِينَ
t: Lakunna AAibada Allahi almukhlaseena
u: To hum Allah ke cheedah (chune huey/chosen) banday hotay

ar: فَكَفَرُواْ بِهِۦۖ فَسَوۡفَ يَعۡلَمُونَ
t: Fakafaroo bihi fasawfa yaAAlamoona
u: Magar (jab woh aa gaya) to inhon ne uska inkar kardiya, ab ankareeb inhein (is rawish ka natija) maloom ho jayega

ar: وَلَقَدۡ سَبَقَتۡ كَلِمَتُنَا لِعِبَادِنَا ٱلۡمُرۡسَلِينَ
t: Walaqad sabaqat kalimatuna liAAibadina almursaleena
u: Apne bheje huey bandon se hum pehle hi waada kar chuke hain

ar: إِنَّهُمۡ لَهُمُ ٱلۡمَنصُورُونَ
t: Innahum lahumu almansooroona
u: Ke yaqeenan unki madad ki jayegi

ar: وَإِنَّ جُندَنَا لَهُمُ ٱلۡغَٰلِبُونَ
t: Wainna jundana lahumu alghaliboona
u: Aur hamara lashkar hi gaalib hokar rahega

ar: فَتَوَلَّ عَنۡهُمۡ حَتَّىٰ حِينࣲ‏
t: Fatawalla AAanhum hatta heenin
u: Pas (aey Nabi) zara kuch muddat tak inhein inke haal par chodh do

ar: وَأَبۡصِرۡهُمۡ فَسَوۡفَ يُبۡصِرُونَ
t: Waabsirhum fasawfa yubsiroona
u: Aur dekhte raho, anqareeb yeh khud bhi dekh lengey

ar: أَفَبِعَذَابِنَا يَسۡتَعۡجِلُونَ
t: AfabiAAathabina yastaAAjiloona
u: Kya yeh hamare azaab ke liye jaldi macha rahey hain

ar: فَإِذَا نَزَلَ بِسَاحَتِهِمۡ فَسَآءَ صَبَاحُ ٱلۡمُنذَرِينَ
t: Faitha nazala bisahatihim fasaa sabahu almunthareena
u: Jab woh inke sehan (maidan/open space) mein aa utrega woh din un logon ke liye bahut bura hoga jinhein mutanabbeh (warn) kiya ja chuka hai

ar: وَتَوَلَّ عَنۡهُمۡ حَتَّىٰ حِينࣲ‏
t: Watawalla AAanhum hatta heenin
u: Pas zara inhein kuch muddat ke liye chodh do

ar: وَأَبۡصِرۡ فَسَوۡفَ يُبۡصِرُونَ
t: Waabsir fasawfa yubsiroona
u: Aur dekhte raho, anqareeb yeh khud dekh lenge

ar: سُبۡحَٰنَ رَبِّكَ رَبِّ ٱلۡعِزَّةِ عَمَّا يَصِفُونَ
t: Subhana rabbika rabbi alAAizzati AAamma yasifoona
u: Paak hai tera Rubb, izzat ka maalik, un tamaam baaton se jo yeh log bana rahey hain

ar: وَسَلَٰمٌ عَلَى ٱلۡمُرۡسَلِينَ
t: Wasalamun AAala almursaleena
u: Aur salaam hai mursalin (messengers) par

ar: وَٱلۡحَمۡدُ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ ٱلۡعَٰلَمِينَ
t: Waalhamdu lillahi rabbi alAAalameena
u: Aur saari taarif Allah Rabbul Aalameen hi ke liye hai

ar: صٓۚ وَٱلۡقُرۡءَانِ ذِي ٱلذِّكۡرِ
t: Sad waalqurani thee alththikri
u: Saad, kasam hai naseehat bharey Quran ki

ar: بَلِ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ فِي عِزَّةࣲ وَشِقَاقࣲ‏
t: Bali allatheena kafaroo fee AAizzatin washiqaqin
u: Balke yahi log, jinhon ne maanney se inkar kiya hai, sakht takabbur aur zid mein mubtila hain

ar: كَمۡ أَهۡلَكۡنَا مِن قَبۡلِهِم مِّن قَرۡنࣲ فَنَادَواْ وَّلَاتَ حِينَ مَنَاصࣲ‏
t: Kam ahlakna min qablihim min qarnin fanadaw walata heena manasin
u: Insey pehle hum aisi kitni hi qaumon ko halaak kar chuke hain (aur jab unki shamat aayi hai) to woh cheekh utthey hain, magar woh waqt bachne ka nahin hota

ar: وَعَجِبُوٓاْ أَن جَآءَهُم مُّنذِرࣱ مِّنۡهُمۡۖ وَقَالَ ٱلۡكَٰفِرُونَ هَٰذَا سَٰحِرࣱ كَذَّابٌ
t: WaAAajiboo an jaahum munthirun minhum waqala alkafiroona hatha sahirun kaththabun
u: In logon ko is baat par bada taajub hua ke ek darane wala khud inhi mein se aa gaya, munkireen kehne lagey ke “yeh saahir(sorcerer) hai, sakht jhoota hai

ar: أَجَعَلَ ٱلۡأٓلِهَةَ إِلَٰهࣰ ا وَٰحِدًاۖ إِنَّ هَٰذَا لَشَيۡءٌ عُجَابࣱ‏
t: AjaAAala alalihata ilahan wahidan inna hatha lashayon AAujabun
u: Kya isney saarey khudaon ki jagah bas ek hi khuda bana dala? Yeh to badi ajeeb baat hai”

ar: وَٱنطَلَقَ ٱلۡمَلَأُ مِنۡهُمۡ أَنِ ٱمۡشُواْ وَٱصۡبِرُواْ عَلَىٰٓ ءَالِهَتِكُمۡۖ إِنَّ هَٰذَا لَشَيۡءࣱ يُرَادُ
t: Waintalaqa almalao minhum ani imshoo waisbiroo AAala alihatikum inna hatha lashayon yuradu
u: Aur sardaran e qaum yeh kehte huey nikal gaye ke “ chalo aur dat-tey raho apne maboodon ki ibadat par. Yeh baat to kisi aur hi garaz se kahi ja rahi hai

ar: مَا سَمِعۡنَا بِهَٰذَا فِي ٱلۡمِلَّةِ ٱلۡأٓخِرَةِ إِنۡ هَٰذَآ إِلَّا ٱخۡتِلَٰقٌ
t: Ma samiAAna bihatha fee almillati alakhirati in hatha illa ikhtilaqun
u: Yeh baat humne zamana e qareeb ki millat mein kisi se nahin suni. Yeh kuch nahin hai magar ek man-ghadat baat

ar: أَءُنزِلَ عَلَيۡهِ ٱلذِّكۡرُ مِنۢ بَيۡنِنَاۚ بَلۡ هُمۡ فِي شَكࣲّ مِّن ذِكۡرِيۚ بَل لَّمَّا يَذُوقُواْ عَذَابِ
t: Aonzila AAalayhi alththikru min baynina bal hum fee shakkin min thikree bal lamma yathooqoo AAathabi
u: Kya hamarey darmiyan bas yahi ek shaks reh gaya tha jispar Allah ka zikr nazil kardiya gaya?”Asal baat yeh hai ke yeh mere “Zikr” par shakk kar rahey hain , aur yeh saari baatein isliye kar rahey hain ke inhon ne mere azaab ka maza chakkha nahin hai

ar: أَمۡ عِندَهُمۡ خَزَآئِنُ رَحۡمَةِ رَبِّكَ ٱلۡعَزِيزِ ٱلۡوَهَّابِ
t: Am AAindahum khazainu rahmati rabbika alAAazeezi alwahhabi
u: Kya tere daata (great Bestower) aur gaalib parwardigar ki rehmat ke khazane inke kabze mein hain

ar: أَمۡ لَهُم مُّلۡكُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَاۖ فَلۡيَرۡتَقُواْ فِي ٱلۡأَسۡبَٰبِ
t: Am lahum mulku alssamawati waalardi wama baynahuma falyartaqoo fee alasbabi
u: Kya yeh aasmaan o zameen aur inke darmiyan ki cheezon ke maalik hain? Accha to yeh aalam e asbaab ki bulandiyon par chadh kar dekhein

ar: جُندࣱ مَّا هُنَالِكَ مَهۡزُومࣱ مِّنَ ٱلۡأَحۡزَابِ
t: Jundun ma hunalika mahzoomun mina alahzabi
u: Yeh to jatthon (armies) mein se ek choota sa jattha (army) hai jo isi jagah shikhast(suffer defeat) khane wala hai

ar: كَذَّبَتۡ قَبۡلَهُمۡ قَوۡمُ نُوحࣲ وَعَادࣱ وَفِرۡعَوۡنُ ذُو ٱلۡأَوۡتَادِ
t: Kaththabat qablahum qawmu noohin waAAadun wafirAAawnu thoo alawtadi
u: Insey pehle Nooh ki qaum, aur Aad, aur mekhon (tent-pegs/stakes) wala Firoun

ar: وَثَمُودُ وَقَوۡمُ لُوطࣲ وَأَصۡحَٰبُ لۡـَٔيۡكَةِۚ أُوْلَٰٓئِكَ ٱلۡأَحۡزَابُ
t: Wathamoodu waqawmu lootin waashabu alaykati olaika alahzabu
u: Aur Samood, aur qaum e Lut, aur aika waley jhutla chuke hain. Jatthay woh thay

ar: إِن كُلٌّ إِلَّا كَذَّبَ ٱلرُّسُلَ فَحَقَّ عِقَابِ
t: In kullun illa kaththaba alrrusula fahaqqa AAiqabi
u: Unmein se har ek ne Rasoolon ko jhutlaya aur meri uqubat ka faisla (decree of chastisement )uspar chaspan ho kar raha

ar: وَمَا يَنظُرُ هَٰٓؤُلَآءِ إِلَّا صَيۡحَةࣰ وَٰحِدَةࣰ مَّا لَهَا مِن فَوَاقࣲ‏
t: Wama yanthuru haolai illa sayhatan wahidatan ma laha min fawaqin
u: Yeh log bhi bas ek dhamake ke muntazir hain jiske baad koi dusra dhamaka na hoga

ar: وَقَالُواْ رَبَّنَا عَجِّل لَّنَا قِطَّنَا قَبۡلَ يَوۡمِ ٱلۡحِسَابِ
t: Waqaloo rabbana AAajjil lana qittana qabla yawmi alhisabi
u: Aur yeh kehte hain ke aey hamare Rubb, yaum ul hisaab(hisab ke din) se pehle hi hamara hissa humein jaldi se dey dey

ar: ٱصۡبِرۡ عَلَىٰ مَا يَقُولُونَ وَٱذۡكُرۡ عَبۡدَنَا دَاوُۥدَ ذَا ٱلۡأَيۡدِۖ إِنَّهُۥٓ أَوَّابٌ
t: Isbir AAala ma yaqooloona waothkur AAabdana dawooda tha alaydi innahu awwabun
u: (Aey Nabi), sabr karo un baaton par jo yeh log banate hain, aur inke saamne hamare banday Dawood ka qissa bayan karo jo badi quwaton ka maalik tha. Har maamle mein Allah ki taraf rujoo karne wala tha

ar: إِنَّا سَخَّرۡنَا ٱلۡجِبَالَ مَعَهُۥ يُسَبِّحۡنَ بِٱلۡعَشِيِّ وَٱلۡإِشۡرَاقِ
t: Inna sakhkharna aljibala maAAahu yusabbihna bialAAashiyyi waalishraqi
u: Humne pahadon ko uske saath musakkhar kar rakkha tha ke subah o shaam woh uske saath tasbeeh karte thay

ar: وَٱلطَّيۡرَ مَحۡشُورَةࣰۖ كُلࣱّ لَّهُۥٓ أَوَّابࣱ‏
t: Waalttayra mahshooratan kullun lahu awwabun
u: Parindey simat aate aur sabke sab uski tasbeeh ki taraf mutawajjeh ho jatey thay

ar: وَشَدَدۡنَا مُلۡكَهُۥ وَءَاتَيۡنَٰهُ ٱلۡحِكۡمَةَ وَفَصۡلَ ٱلۡخِطَابِ
t: Washadadna mulkahu waataynahu alhikmata wafasla alkhitabi
u: Humne uski sultanat mazboot kardi thi, usko hikmat ata ki thi aur faislay-kun baat kehne ki salahiyat bakshi thi

ar: ۞وَهَلۡ أَتَىٰكَ نَبَؤُاْ ٱلۡخَصۡمِ إِذۡ تَسَوَّرُواْ ٱلۡمِحۡرَابَ
t: Wahal ataka nabao alkhasmi ith tasawwaroo almihraba
u: Phir tumhein kuch khabar pahunchi hai un muqaddame walon ki jo deewaar chadh kar uske baala khaane(private chambers) mein ghus aaye thay

ar: إِذۡ دَخَلُواْ عَلَىٰ دَاوُۥدَ فَفَزِعَ مِنۡهُمۡۖ قَالُواْ لَا تَخَفۡۖ خَصۡمَانِ بَغَىٰ بَعۡضُنَا عَلَىٰ بَعۡضࣲ فَٱحۡكُم بَيۡنَنَا بِٱلۡحَقِّ وَلَا تُشۡطِطۡ وَٱهۡدِنَآ إِلَىٰ سَوَآءِ ٱلصِّرَٰطِ
t: Ith dakhaloo AAala dawooda fafaziAAa minhum qaloo la takhaf khasmani bagha baAAduna AAala baAAdin faohkum baynana bialhaqqi wala tushtit waihdina ila sawai alssirati
u: Jab woh Dawood ke paas pahunche to woh unhein dekh kar ghabra gaya, unhon ne kaha “dariye nahin, hum do fareeq muqaddama hain jin mein se ek ne dusre par zyadati ki hai. Aap hamare darmiyan theek theek haqq ke saath faisla kardijiye, be-insafi na kijiye aur humein raah e raast bataiye

ar: إِنَّ هَٰذَآ أَخِي لَهُۥ تِسۡعࣱ وَتِسۡعُونَ نَعۡجَةࣰ وَلِيَ نَعۡجَةࣱ وَٰحِدَةࣱ فَقَالَ أَكۡفِلۡنِيهَا وَعَزَّنِي فِي ٱلۡخِطَابِ
t: Inna hatha akhee lahu tisAAun watisAAoona naAAjatan waliya naAAjatun wahidatun faqala akfilneeha waAAazzanee fee alkhitabi
u: Yeh meri bhai hai ,iske paas ninanve (ninety nine) dumbiyan(ewes) hai aur mere paas sirf ek hi dumbi (ewe) hai , isne mujhse kaha ke yeh ek dumbi bhi mere hawale karde aur isne guftagu mein mujhe daba liya”

ar: قَالَ لَقَدۡ ظَلَمَكَ بِسُؤَالِ نَعۡجَتِكَ إِلَىٰ نِعَاجِهِۦۖ وَإِنَّ كَثِيرࣰ ا مِّنَ ٱلۡخُلَطَآءِ لَيَبۡغِي بَعۡضُهُمۡ عَلَىٰ بَعۡضٍ إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَعَمِلُواْ ٱلصَّٰلِحَٰتِ وَقَلِيلࣱ مَّا هُمۡۗ وَظَنَّ دَاوُۥدُ أَنَّمَا فَتَنَّٰهُ فَٱسۡتَغۡفَرَ رَبَّهُۥ وَخَرَّۤ رَاكِعࣰ اۤ وَأَنَابَ۩
t: Qala laqad thalamaka bisuali naAAjatika ila niAAajihi wainna katheeran mina alkhulatai layabghee baAAduhum AAala baAAdin illa allatheena amanoo waAAamiloo alssalihati waqaleelun ma hum wathanna dawoodu annama fatannahu faistaghfara rabbahu wakharra rakiAAan waanaba
u: Dawood ne jawab diya: “is shaks ne apni dumbiyon (ewes) ke saath teri dumbi mila lene ka mutalaba karke yaqeenan tujhpar zulm kiya, aur waqiya yeh hai ke mil-jhul kar saath rehne waley log aksar ek dusre par zyadatiyan karte rehte hain, bas wahi log is se bachey huey hain jo iman rakhte hain aur amal e saleh karte hain, aur aisey log kam hi hain.” (Yeh baat kehte kehte) Dawood samajh gaya ke yeh to humne dar-asal iski aazmaish ki hai, chunanche usne apne Rubb se maafi maangi aur sajde mein gir gaya aur rujoo karliya

ar: فَغَفَرۡنَا لَهُۥ ذَٰلِكَۖ وَإِنَّ لَهُۥ عِندَنَا لَزُلۡفَىٰ وَحُسۡنَ مَـَٔابࣲ‏
t: Faghafarna lahu thalika wainna lahu AAindana lazulfa wahusna maabin
u: Tab humne iska woh kasoor maaf kiya aur yaqeenan hamare haan uske liye taqarrub ka muqaam aur behtar anjaam hai

ar: يَٰدَاوُۥدُ إِنَّا جَعَلۡنَٰكَ خَلِيفَةࣰ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ فَٱحۡكُم بَيۡنَ ٱلنَّاسِ بِٱلۡحَقِّ وَلَا تَتَّبِعِ ٱلۡهَوَىٰ فَيُضِلَّكَ عَن سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِۚ إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ يَضِلُّونَ عَن سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ لَهُمۡ عَذَابࣱ شَدِيدُۢ بِمَا نَسُواْ يَوۡمَ ٱلۡحِسَابِ
t: Ya dawoodu inna jaAAalnaka khaleefatan fee alardi faohkum bayna alnnasi bialhaqqi wala tattabiAAi alhawa fayudillaka AAan sabeeli Allahi inna allatheena yadilloona AAan sabeeli Allahi lahum AAathabun shadeedun bima nasoo yawma alhisabi
u: (Humne ussey kaha) “Aey dawood, humne tujhey zameen mein khalifa banaya hai, lihaza tu logon ke darmiyan haqq ke saath hukumat kar, aur khwaish e nafs ki pairwi na kar ke woh tujhey Allah ki raah se bhatka degi. Jo log Allah ki raah se bhatakte hain yaqeenan unke liye sakht saza hai ke woh yaum ul hisaab ko bhool gaye.”

ar: وَمَا خَلَقۡنَا ٱلسَّمَآءَ وَٱلۡأَرۡضَ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَا بَٰطِلࣰ اۚ ذَٰلِكَ ظَنُّ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْۚ فَوَيۡلࣱ لِّلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ مِنَ ٱلنَّارِ
t: Wama khalaqna alssamaa waalarda wama baynahuma batilan thalika thannu allatheena kafaroo fawaylun lillatheena kafaroo mina alnnari
u: Humne is aasmaan aur zameen ko, aur is duniya ko jo inke darmiyan hai , fizool paida nahin kardiya hai, yeh to un logon ka gumaan hai jinhon ne kufr kiya hai aur aisey kaafiron ke liye barbadi hai jahannum ki aag se

ar: أَمۡ نَجۡعَلُ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَعَمِلُواْ ٱلصَّٰلِحَٰتِ كَٱلۡمُفۡسِدِينَ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ أَمۡ نَجۡعَلُ ٱلۡمُتَّقِينَ كَٱلۡفُجَّارِ
t: Am najAAalu allatheena amanoo waAAamiloo alssalihati kaalmufsideena fee alardi am najAAalu almuttaqeena kaalfujjari
u: Kya hum un logon ko jo iman laatey hain aur neik aamaal karte hain aur unko jo zameen mein fasad karne waley hain yaksan kardein? Kya muttaqiyon ko hum faajiron(wicked) jaisa kardein

ar: كِتَٰبٌ أَنزَلۡنَٰهُ إِلَيۡكَ مُبَٰرَكࣱ لِّيَدَّبَّرُوٓاْ ءَايَٰتِهِۦ وَلِيَتَذَكَّرَ أُوْلُواْ ٱلۡأَلۡبَٰبِ
t: Kitabun anzalnahu ilayka mubarakun liyaddabbaroo ayatihi waliyatathakkara oloo alalbabi
u: Yeh ek badi barakat wali kitaab hai jo (aey Muhammad) humne tumhari taraf nazil ki hai taa-ke yeh log iski aayat par gaur karein aur aqal o fikr rakhne wale issey sabaq lein

ar: وَوَهَبۡنَا لِدَاوُۥدَ سُلَيۡمَٰنَۚ نِعۡمَ ٱلۡعَبۡدُ إِنَّهُۥٓ أَوَّابٌ
t: Wawahabna lidawooda sulaymana niAAma alAAabdu innahu awwabun
u: Aur Dawood ko humne Sulaiman (jaisa beta) ata kiya, behtareen banda, kasrat se apne Rubb ki taraf rujoo karne wala

ar: إِذۡ عُرِضَ عَلَيۡهِ بِٱلۡعَشِيِّ ٱلصَّٰفِنَٰتُ ٱلۡجِيَادُ
t: Ith AAurida AAalayhi bialAAashiyyi alssafinatu aljiyadu
u: Kaabil e zikr hai woh mauqa jab shaam ke waqt us ke saamne khoob sidhey (well-trained) huey tez-rau(running) ghoday (horses) pesh kiye gaye

ar: فَقَالَ إِنِّيٓ أَحۡبَبۡتُ حُبَّ ٱلۡخَيۡرِ عَن ذِكۡرِ رَبِّي حَتَّىٰ تَوَارَتۡ بِٱلۡحِجَابِ
t: Faqala innee ahbabtu hubba alkhayri AAan thikri rabbee hatta tawarat bialhijabi
u: To usne kaha “maine is maal ki muhabbat apne Rubb ki yaad ki wajah se ikhtiyar ki hai” yahan tak ke jab woh ghoday (horses) nigaah se ojhal ho gaye

ar: رُدُّوهَا عَلَيَّۖ فَطَفِقَ مَسۡحَۢا بِٱلسُّوقِ وَٱلۡأَعۡنَاقِ
t: Ruddooha AAalayya fatafiqa mashan bialssooqi waalaAAnaqi
u: To (usne hukum diya ke) inhein mere paas wapas laao, phir laga unki pindliyon (legs) aur gardano (necks) par haath pherne

ar: وَلَقَدۡ فَتَنَّا سُلَيۡمَٰنَ وَأَلۡقَيۡنَا عَلَىٰ كُرۡسِيِّهِۦ جَسَدࣰ ا ثُمَّ أَنَابَ
t: Walaqad fatanna sulaymana waalqayna AAala kursiyyihi jasadan thumma anaba
u: Aur (dekho ke) Sulaiman ko bhi humne aazmaish mein daala aur uski kursi par ek jasad (mere body/body without life) laa kar daal diya phir usne rujoo kiya

ar: قَالَ رَبِّ ٱغۡفِرۡ لِي وَهَبۡ لِي مُلۡكࣰ ا لَّا يَنۢبَغِي لِأَحَدࣲ مِّنۢ بَعۡدِيٓۖ إِنَّكَ أَنتَ ٱلۡوَهَّابُ
t: Qala rabbi ighfir lee wahab lee mulkan la yanbaghee liahadin min baAAdee innaka anta alwahhabu
u: Aur kaha ke “aey mere Rubb , mujhey maaf karde aur mujhey woh baadshahi de jo mere baad kisi ke liye sazawar na ho, beshak tu hi asal daata hai”

ar: فَسَخَّرۡنَا لَهُ ٱلرِّيحَ تَجۡرِي بِأَمۡرِهِۦ رُخَآءً حَيۡثُ أَصَابَ
t: Fasakhkharna lahu alrreeha tajree biamrihi rukhaan haythu asaba
u: Tab humne uske liye hawa ko musakkhar kardiya jo uske hukum se narmi ke saath chalti thi jidhar woh chahta tha

ar: وَٱلشَّيَٰطِينَ كُلَّ بَنَّآءࣲ وَغَوَّاصࣲ‏
t: Waalshshayateena kulla bannain waghawwasin
u: Aur shayateen ko musakkhar kardiya, har tarah ke meimaar(builders) aur gotakhor (divers)

ar: وَءَاخَرِينَ مُقَرَّنِينَ فِي ٱلۡأَصۡفَادِ
t: Waakhareena muqarraneena fee alasfadi
u: Aur dusre jo paband e salasil thay(bound with chains)

ar: هَٰذَا عَطَآؤُنَا فَٱمۡنُنۡ أَوۡ أَمۡسِكۡ بِغَيۡرِ حِسَابࣲ‏
t: Hatha AAataona faomnun aw amsik bighayri hisabin
u: (humne ussey kaha) “ yeh hamari bakshish hai, tujhey ikhtiyar hai jisey chahe de aur jissey chahe rok le, koi hisaab nahin”

ar: وَإِنَّ لَهُۥ عِندَنَا لَزُلۡفَىٰ وَحُسۡنَ مَـَٔابࣲ‏
t: Wainna lahu AAindana lazulfa wahusna maabin
u: Yaqeenan uske liye hamare haan taqarrub ka muqaam aur behtar anjaam hai

ar: وَٱذۡكُرۡ عَبۡدَنَآ أَيُّوبَ إِذۡ نَادَىٰ رَبَّهُۥٓ أَنِّي مَسَّنِيَ ٱلشَّيۡطَٰنُ بِنُصۡبࣲ وَعَذَابٍ
t: Waothkur AAabdana ayyooba ith nada rabbahu annee massaniya alshshaytanu binusbin waAAathabin
u: Aur hamare banday Ayub ka zikar karo, jab usne apne Rubb ko pukara ke shaytaan ne mujhey sakht takleef aur azaab mein daal diya hai

ar: ٱرۡكُضۡ بِرِجۡلِكَۖ هَٰذَا مُغۡتَسَلُۢ بَارِدࣱ وَشَرَابࣱ‏
t: Orkud birijlika hatha mughtasalun baridun washarabun
u: (Humne usey hukum diya) apna paaon (leg) zameen par maar, yeh hai thanda pani nahane ke liya aur peene ke liye

ar: وَوَهَبۡنَا لَهُۥٓ أَهۡلَهُۥ وَمِثۡلَهُم مَّعَهُمۡ رَحۡمَةࣰ مِّنَّا وَذِكۡرَىٰ لِأُوْلِي ٱلۡأَلۡبَٰبِ
t: Wawahabna lahu ahlahu wamithlahum maAAahum rahmatan minna wathikra liolee alalbabi
u: Humne usey uske ahal o ayaal wapas diye aur unke saath utnay hi aur, apni taraf se rehmat ke taur par, aur aqal o fikar rakhne walon ke liye dars ke taur par

ar: وَخُذۡ بِيَدِكَ ضِغۡثࣰ ا فَٱضۡرِب بِّهِۦ وَلَا تَحۡنَثۡۗ إِنَّا وَجَدۡنَٰهُ صَابِرࣰ اۚ نِّعۡمَ ٱلۡعَبۡدُ إِنَّهُۥٓ أَوَّابࣱ‏
t: Wakhuth biyadika dighthan faidrib bihi wala tahnath inna wajadnahu sabiran niAAma alAAabdu innahu awwabun
u: (Aur humne issey kaha) tinkon ka ek mutta lay (bundle of rushes) aur ussey maar de, apni kasam na todh, humne usey saabir paya, behtareen banda, apne Rubb ki taraf bahut rujoo karne wala

ar: وَٱذۡكُرۡ عِبَٰدَنَآ إِبۡرَٰهِيمَ وَإِسۡحَٰقَ وَيَعۡقُوبَ أُوْلِي ٱلۡأَيۡدِي وَٱلۡأَبۡصَٰرِ
t: Waothkur AAibadana ibraheema waishaqa wayaAAqooba olee alaydee waalabsari
u: Aur hamare bandon , Ibrahim aur Ishaq aur Yaqub ka zikar karo badi quwwat e amail rakhne wale aur deedhawar (strength and vision)log thay

ar: إِنَّآ أَخۡلَصۡنَٰهُم بِخَالِصَةࣲ ذِكۡرَى ٱلدَّارِ
t: Inna akhlasnahum bikhalisatin thikra alddari
u: Humne unko ek khaalis siffat ki bina par barguzida kiya tha, aur woh daar-e-aakhirat ki yaad thi

ar: وَإِنَّهُمۡ عِندَنَا لَمِنَ ٱلۡمُصۡطَفَيۡنَ ٱلۡأَخۡيَارِ
t: Wainnahum AAindana lamina almustafayna alakhyari
u: Yaqeenan hamare haan unka shumaar chunay huey neik ashkhaas(excellent ones) mein hai

ar: وَٱذۡكُرۡ إِسۡمَٰعِيلَ وَٱلۡيَسَعَ وَذَا ٱلۡكِفۡلِۖ وَكُلࣱّ مِّنَ ٱلۡأَخۡيَارِ
t: Waothkur ismaAAeela wailyasaAAa watha alkifli wakullun mina alakhyari
u: Aur Ismail aur Al-yasa(Elisha) aur Zulkifl ka zikr karo, yeh sab neik logon mein se thay

ar: هَٰذَا ذِكۡرࣱۚ وَإِنَّ لِلۡمُتَّقِينَ لَحُسۡنَ مَـَٔابࣲ‏
t: Hatha thikrun wainna lilmuttaqeena lahusna maabin
u: Yeh ek zikar tha. (Ab suno ke) muttaqi logon ke liye yaqeenan behtareen thikana hai

ar: جَنَّٰتِ عَدۡنࣲ مُّفَتَّحَةࣰ لَّهُمُ ٱلۡأَبۡوَٰبُ
t: Jannati AAadnin mufattahatan lahumu alabwabu
u: Hamesha rehne wali jannatein jinke darwaze unke liye khuley hongey

ar: مُتَّكِـِٔينَ فِيهَا يَدۡعُونَ فِيهَا بِفَٰكِهَةࣲ كَثِيرَةࣲ وَشَرَابࣲ‏
t: Muttakieena feeha yadAAoona feeha bifakihatin katheeratin washarabin
u: Unmein woh takiye lagaye baithay hongey, khoob khoob fawake aur mashroobat (abundant fruit and drinks) talab kar rahey hongey

ar: ۞وَعِندَهُمۡ قَٰصِرَٰتُ ٱلطَّرۡفِ أَتۡرَابٌ
t: WaAAindahum qasiratu alttarfi atrabun
u: Aur unke paas sharmili humsin biwiyan hongi

ar: هَٰذَا مَا تُوعَدُونَ لِيَوۡمِ ٱلۡحِسَابِ
t: Hatha ma tooAAadoona liyawmi alhisabi
u: Yeh woh chezein hain jinhein hisaab ke din ata karne ka tumse wada kiya ja raha hai

ar: إِنَّ هَٰذَا لَرِزۡقُنَا مَا لَهُۥ مِن نَّفَادٍ
t: Inna hatha larizquna ma lahu min nafadin
u: Yeh hamara rizq hai jo kabhi khatam honaywala nahin

ar: هَٰذَاۚ وَإِنَّ لِلطَّٰغِينَ لَشَرَّ مَـَٔابࣲ‏
t: Hatha wainna lilttagheena lasharra maabin
u: Yeh to hai muttaqiyon ka anjaam aur sarkashon ke liye badhtareen (evil) thikana hai

ar: جَهَنَّمَ يَصۡلَوۡنَهَا فَبِئۡسَ ٱلۡمِهَادُ
t: Jahannama yaslawnaha fabisa almihadu
u: Jahannum jismein woh jhulse jayenge. Bahut hi buri qayamgaah

ar: هَٰذَا فَلۡيَذُوقُوهُ حَمِيمࣱ وَغَسَّاقࣱ‏
t: Hatha falyathooqoohu hameemun waghassaqun
u: Yeh hai unke liye, pas woh maza chakhein khautley (boiling) huey pani aur peep lahu (pus)

ar: وَءَاخَرُ مِن شَكۡلِهِۦٓ أَزۡوَٰجٌ
t: Waakharu min shaklihi azwajun
u: Aur isi qisam ki dusri talkhiyon ka

ar: هَٰذَا فَوۡجࣱ مُّقۡتَحِمࣱ مَّعَكُمۡ لَا مَرۡحَبَۢا بِهِمۡۚ إِنَّهُمۡ صَالُواْ ٱلنَّارِ
t: Hatha fawjun muqtahimun maAAakum la marhaban bihim innahum saloo alnnari
u: (woh jahannum ki taraf apne pairawon ko aatey dekh kar aapas mein kahenge) “Yeh ek lashkar tumhare paas ghusa chala aa raha hai, koi khushamadeed (welcome) inke liye nahin hai, yeh aag mein jhulasne waley hain”

ar: قَالُواْ بَلۡ أَنتُمۡ لَا مَرۡحَبَۢا بِكُمۡۖ أَنتُمۡ قَدَّمۡتُمُوهُ لَنَاۖ فَبِئۡسَ ٱلۡقَرَارُ
t: Qaloo bal antum la marhaban bikum antum qaddamtumoohu lana fabisa alqararu
u: Woh unko jawab denge “ nahin balke tum hi jhulse ja rahe ho, koi khair maqdam tumhare liye nahin. Tumhi to yeh anjaam hamare aagey laye ho. Kaisi buri hai yeh jaaye qaraar”

ar: قَالُواْ رَبَّنَا مَن قَدَّمَ لَنَا هَٰذَا فَزِدۡهُ عَذَابࣰ ا ضِعۡفࣰ ا فِي ٱلنَّارِ
t: Qaloo rabbana man qaddama lana hatha fazidhu AAathaban diAAfan fee alnnari
u: Phir woh kahenge “Aey hamare Rubb, jisne humein is anjaam ko pahunchane ka bandobast kiya usko dozakh ka dohra azaab de”

ar: وَقَالُواْ مَا لَنَا لَا نَرَىٰ رِجَالࣰ ا كُنَّا نَعُدُّهُم مِّنَ ٱلۡأَشۡرَارِ
t: Waqaloo ma lana la nara rijalan kunna naAAudduhum mina alashrari
u: Aur woh aapas mein kahenge “kya baat hai, hum un logon ko kahin nahin dekhte jinehin hum duniya mein bura samajte thay

ar: أَتَّخَذۡنَٰهُمۡ سِخۡرِيًّا أَمۡ زَاغَتۡ عَنۡهُمُ ٱلۡأَبۡصَٰرُ
t: Attakhathnahum sikhriyyan am zaghat AAanhumu alabsaru
u: Hunme yunhi unka mazaaq bana liya tha, ya woh kahin nazaron se ojhal hain?”

ar: إِنَّ ذَٰلِكَ لَحَقࣱّ تَخَاصُمُ أَهۡلِ ٱلنَّارِ
t: Inna thalika lahaqqun takhasumu ahli alnnari
u: Beshak yeh baat sacchi hai, ehle dozakh mein yahi kuch jhagde honay waley hain

ar: قُلۡ إِنَّمَآ أَنَا۠ مُنذِرࣱۖ وَمَا مِنۡ إِلَٰهٍ إِلَّا ٱللَّهُ ٱلۡوَٰحِدُ ٱلۡقَهَّارُ
t: Qul innama ana munthirun wama min ilahin illa Allahu alwahidu alqahharu
u: (Aey Nabi) insey kaho, “ main to bas khabardar kardene wala hoon. Koi haqeeqi mabood nahin magar Allah, jo yakta hai, sab par gaalib

ar: رَبُّ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَا ٱلۡعَزِيزُ ٱلۡغَفَّٰرُ
t: Rabbu alssamawati waalardi wama baynahuma alAAazeezu alghaffaru
u: Aasmaano aur zameen ka maalik aur un saari cheezon ka maalik jo inke darmiyan hain, zabardast aur darguzar karne wala”

ar: قُلۡ هُوَ نَبَؤٌاْ عَظِيمٌ
t: Qul huwa nabaon AAatheemun
u: Insey kaho “ yeh ek badi khabar hai

ar: أَنتُمۡ عَنۡهُ مُعۡرِضُونَ
t: Antum AAanhu muAAridoona
u: Jisko sunkar tum mooh pherte ho”

ar: مَا كَانَ لِيَ مِنۡ عِلۡمِۭ بِٱلۡمَلَإِ ٱلۡأَعۡلَىٰٓ إِذۡ يَخۡتَصِمُونَ
t: Ma kana liya min AAilmin bialmalai alaAAla ith yakhtasimoona
u: (Insey kaho) “Mujhey us waqt ki koi khabar na thi jab mala-e-aala (high council) mein jhagda ho raha tha

ar: إِن يُوحَىٰٓ إِلَيَّ إِلَّآ أَنَّمَآ أَنَا۠ نَذِيرࣱ مُّبِينٌ
t: In yooha ilayya illa annama ana natheerun mubeenun
u: Mujhko to wahee (revelation/inspiration) ke zariye se yeh baatein sirf isliye batayi jaati hain ke main khula khula khabardar karne wala hoon”

ar: إِذۡ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلۡمَلَٰٓئِكَةِ إِنِّي خَٰلِقُۢ بَشَرࣰ ا مِّن طِينࣲ‏
t: Ith qala rabbuka lilmalaikati innee khaliqun basharan min teenin
u: Jab tere Rubb ne farishton se kaha “main mitti se ek bashar banane wala hoon

ar: فَإِذَا سَوَّيۡتُهُۥ وَنَفَخۡتُ فِيهِ مِن رُّوحِي فَقَعُواْ لَهُۥ سَٰجِدِينَ
t: Faitha sawwaytuhu wanafakhtu feehi min roohee faqaAAoo lahu sajideena
u: Phir jab main usey puri tarah bana doon aur usmein apni rooh phoonk doon to tum uske aagey sajde mein gir jao”

ar: فَسَجَدَ ٱلۡمَلَٰٓئِكَةُ كُلُّهُمۡ أَجۡمَعُونَ
t: Fasajada almalaikatu kulluhum ajmaAAoona
u: Is hukum ke mutaabiq farishtey sab ke sab sajde mein gir gaye

ar: إِلَّآ إِبۡلِيسَ ٱسۡتَكۡبَرَ وَكَانَ مِنَ ٱلۡكَٰفِرِينَ
t: Illa ibleesa istakbara wakana mina alkafireena
u: Magar Iblis ne apni badayi ka ghamand kiya aur woh kaafiron mein se ho gaya

ar: قَالَ يَٰٓإِبۡلِيسُ مَا مَنَعَكَ أَن تَسۡجُدَ لِمَا خَلَقۡتُ بِيَدَيَّۖ أَسۡتَكۡبَرۡتَ أَمۡ كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلۡعَالِينَ
t: Qala ya ibleesu ma manaAAaka an tasjuda lima khalaqtu biyadayya astakbarta am kunta mina alAAaleena
u: Rubb ne farmaya “Aey Iblis, tujhey kya cheez usko sajda karne se maanay hui jisey maine apne dono haathon se banaya hai? Tu bada ban raha hai ya tu hai hi kuch unchey darje ki hastiyon mein se?”

ar: قَالَ أَنَا۠ خَيۡرࣱ مِّنۡهُ خَلَقۡتَنِي مِن نَّارࣲ وَخَلَقۡتَهُۥ مِن طِينࣲ‏
t: Qala ana khayrun minhu khalaqtanee min narin wakhalaqtahu min teenin
u: Usne jawab diya “main ussey behtar hoon , aapne mujhko aag se paida kiya hai aur isko mitti se”

ar: قَالَ فَٱخۡرُجۡ مِنۡهَا فَإِنَّكَ رَجِيمࣱ‏
t: Qala faokhruj minha fainnaka rajeemun
u: Farmaya “ accha to yahan se nikal ja , tu mardood hai

ar: وَإِنَّ عَلَيۡكَ لَعۡنَتِيٓ إِلَىٰ يَوۡمِ ٱلدِّينِ
t: Wainna AAalayka laAAnatee ila yawmi alddeeni
u: Aur tere upar yaum ul jaza tak meri laanat hai”

ar: قَالَ رَبِّ فَأَنظِرۡنِيٓ إِلَىٰ يَوۡمِ يُبۡعَثُونَ
t: Qala rabbi faanthirnee ila yawmi yubAAathoona
u: Woh bola “ aey mere Rubb , yeh baat hai to phir mujhey us waqt tak ke liye mohlat dey dey jab yeh log dobara uthaye jayenge”

ar: قَالَ فَإِنَّكَ مِنَ ٱلۡمُنظَرِينَ
t: Qala fainnaka mina almunthareena
u: Farmaya, “accha tujhey us roz tak ki mohlat hai

ar: إِلَىٰ يَوۡمِ ٱلۡوَقۡتِ ٱلۡمَعۡلُومِ
t: Ila yawmi alwaqti almaAAloomi
u: Jiska waqt mujhey maloom hai”

ar: قَالَ فَبِعِزَّتِكَ لَأُغۡوِيَنَّهُمۡ أَجۡمَعِينَ
t: Qala fabiAAizzatika laoghwiyannahum ajmaAAeena
u: Usne kaha “ teri izzat ki kasam, main in sab logon ko behka kar rahunga

ar: إِلَّا عِبَادَكَ مِنۡهُمُ ٱلۡمُخۡلَصِينَ
t: Illa AAibadaka minhumu almukhlaseena
u: Bajuz tere un bandon ke jinhein tu nay khaalis karliya hai”

ar: قَالَ فَٱلۡحَقُّ وَٱلۡحَقَّ أَقُولُ
t: Qala faalhaqqu waalhaqqa aqoolu
u: Farmaya “to haqq yeh hai, aur main haqq hi kaha karta hoon

ar: لَأَمۡلَأَنَّ جَهَنَّمَ مِنكَ وَمِمَّن تَبِعَكَ مِنۡهُمۡ أَجۡمَعِينَ
t: Laamlaanna jahannama minka wamimman tabiAAaka minhum ajmaAAeena
u: Ke main jahannum ko tujhse aur un sab logon se bhar dunga jo in Insano mein se teri pairwi karenge”

ar: قُلۡ مَآ أَسۡـَٔلُكُمۡ عَلَيۡهِ مِنۡ أَجۡرࣲ وَمَآ أَنَا۠ مِنَ ٱلۡمُتَكَلِّفِينَ
t: Qul ma asalukum AAalayhi min ajrin wama ana mina almutakallifeena
u: (Aey Nabi) insey kehdo ke main is tableeg par tumse koi ajar nahin maangta, aur na main banawati logon mein se hoon

ar: إِنۡ هُوَ إِلَّا ذِكۡرࣱ لِّلۡعَٰلَمِينَ
t: In huwa illa thikrun lilAAalameena
u: Yeh to ek naseehat hai tamam jahaan walon ke liye

ar: وَلَتَعۡلَمُنَّ نَبَأَهُۥ بَعۡدَ حِينِۭ
t: WalataAAlamunna nabaahu baAAda heenin
u: Aur thodi muddat hi guzaregi ke tumhein iska haal khud maaloom ho jayega

ar: تَنزِيلُ ٱلۡكِتَٰبِ مِنَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلۡعَزِيزِ ٱلۡحَكِيمِ
t: Tanzeelu alkitabi mina Allahi alAAazeezi alhakeemi
u: Is kitaab ka nuzul Allah zabardast aur dana (hikmat wala/full of Wisdom) ki taraf se hai

ar: إِنَّآ أَنزَلۡنَآ إِلَيۡكَ ٱلۡكِتَٰبَ بِٱلۡحَقِّ فَٱعۡبُدِ ٱللَّهَ مُخۡلِصࣰ ا لَّهُ ٱلدِّينَ
t: Inna anzalna ilayka alkitaba bialhaqqi faoAAbudi Allaha mukhlisan lahu alddeena
u: (Aey Muhammad) yeh kitab humne tumhari taraf barhaqq nazil ki hai, lihaza tum Allah hi ki bandagi karo deen ko usi ke liye khalis karte huey

ar: أَلَا لِلَّهِ ٱلدِّينُ ٱلۡخَالِصُۚ وَٱلَّذِينَ ٱتَّخَذُواْ مِن دُونِهِۦٓ أَوۡلِيَآءَ مَا نَعۡبُدُهُمۡ إِلَّا لِيُقَرِّبُونَآ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ زُلۡفَىٰٓ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يَحۡكُمُ بَيۡنَهُمۡ فِي مَا هُمۡ فِيهِ يَخۡتَلِفُونَۗ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَا يَهۡدِي مَنۡ هُوَ كَٰذِبࣱ كَفَّارࣱ‏
t: Ala lillahi alddeenu alkhalisu waallatheena ittakhathoo min doonihi awliyaa ma naAAbuduhum illa liyuqarriboona ila Allahi zulfa inna Allaha yahkumu baynahum fee ma hum feehi yakhtalifoona inna Allaha la yahdee man huwa kathibun kaffarun
u: Khabardar, deen e khalis Allah ka haqq hai.Rahey woh log jinhon ne uske siwa dusre sarparst bana rakkhe hain (aur apne is fail ki taujeeh yeh karte hain ke) hum to unki ibadat sirf is liye karte hain ke woh Allah tak hamari rasayi karadein (bring us nearer to Allah).Allah yaqeenan unke darmiyan un tamaam baaton ka faisla kardega jin mein woh ikhtilaf kar rahey hain. Allah kisi aisey shaks ko hidayat nahin deta jo jhoota aur munkir e haqq ho

ar: لَّوۡ أَرَادَ ٱللَّهُ أَن يَتَّخِذَ وَلَدࣰ ا لَّٱصۡطَفَىٰ مِمَّا يَخۡلُقُ مَا يَشَآءُۚ سُبۡحَٰنَهُۥۖ هُوَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلۡوَٰحِدُ ٱلۡقَهَّارُ
t: Law arada Allahu an yattakhitha waladan laistafa mimma yakhluqu ma yashao subhanahu huwa Allahu alwahidu alqahharu
u: Agar Allah kisi ko beta banana chahta to apni makhlooq mein se jisko chahta barguzida kar leta, Paak hai woh issey (ke koi uska beta ho), woh Allah hai akela aur sab par gaalib

ar: خَلَقَ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضَ بِٱلۡحَقِّۖ يُكَوِّرُ ٱلَّيۡلَ عَلَى ٱلنَّهَارِ وَيُكَوِّرُ ٱلنَّهَارَ عَلَى ٱلَّيۡلِۖ وَسَخَّرَ ٱلشَّمۡسَ وَٱلۡقَمَرَۖ كُلࣱّ يَجۡرِي لِأَجَلࣲ مُّسَمًّىۗ أَلَا هُوَ ٱلۡعَزِيزُ ٱلۡغَفَّٰرُ
t: Khalaqa alssamawati waalarda bialhaqqi yukawwiru allayla AAala alnnahari wayukawwiru alnnahara AAala allayli wasakhkhara alshshamsa waalqamara kullun yajree liajalin musamman ala huwa alAAazeezu alghaffaru
u: Usne aasmano aur zameen ko barhaqq paida kiya hai. Wahi din par raat aur raat par din ko lapeit-ta hai.Usi ne Suraj aur Chand ko is tarah musakkhar kar rakkha hai ke har ek ek waqt e muqarrar tak chale ja raha hai. Jaan rakkho, woh zabardast hai aur darguzar karne wala hai

ar: خَلَقَكُم مِّن نَّفۡسࣲ وَٰحِدَةࣲ ثُمَّ جَعَلَ مِنۡهَا زَوۡجَهَا وَأَنزَلَ لَكُم مِّنَ ٱلۡأَنۡعَٰمِ ثَمَٰنِيَةَ أَزۡوَٰجࣲۚ يَخۡلُقُكُمۡ فِي بُطُونِ أُمَّهَٰتِكُمۡ خَلۡقࣰ ا مِّنۢ بَعۡدِ خَلۡقࣲ فِي ظُلُمَٰتࣲ ثَلَٰثࣲۚ ذَٰلِكُمُ ٱللَّهُ رَبُّكُمۡ لَهُ ٱلۡمُلۡكُۖ لَآ إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَۖ فَأَنَّىٰ تُصۡرَفُونَ
t: Khalaqakum min nafsin wahidatin thumma jaAAala minha zawjaha waanzala lakum mina alanAAami thamaniyata azwajin yakhluqukum fee butooni ommahatikum khalqan min baAAdi khalqin fee thulumatin thalathin thalikumu Allahu rabbukum lahu almulku la ilaha illa huwa faanna tusrafoona
u: Usi ne tumko ek jaan se paida kiya, phir wahi hai jisne us jaan se iska joda banaya aur usi ne tumhare liye maweshiyon mein se aath (eight) nar o maada paida kiye. Woh tumhari Maaon (mothers) ke paithon mein teen teen tareekh (andherey) paradon ke andar tumhein ek ke baad ek shakal deta chala jaata hai. Yahi Allah (jiske yeh kaam hain) tumhara Rubb hai, baadshahi usi ki hai, koi mabood uske siwa nahin hai, phir tum kidhar se phiraye jaa rahe ho

ar: إِن تَكۡفُرُواْ فَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ غَنِيٌّ عَنكُمۡۖ وَلَا يَرۡضَىٰ لِعِبَادِهِ ٱلۡكُفۡرَۖ وَإِن تَشۡكُرُواْ يَرۡضَهُ لَكُمۡۗ وَلَا تَزِرُ وَازِرَةࣱ وِزۡرَ أُخۡرَىٰۚ ثُمَّ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكُم مَّرۡجِعُكُمۡ فَيُنَبِّئُكُم بِمَا كُنتُمۡ تَعۡمَلُونَۚ إِنَّهُۥ عَلِيمُۢ بِذَاتِ ٱلصُّدُورِ
t: In takfuroo fainna Allaha ghaniyyun AAankum wala yarda liAAibadihi alkufra wain tashkuroo yardahu lakum wala taziru waziratun wizra okhra thumma ila rabbikum marjiAAukum fayunabbiokum bima kuntum taAAmaloona innahu AAaleemun bithati alssudoori
u: Agar tum kufr karo to Allah tumse be niyaz hai, lekin woh apne bandon ke liye kufr ko pasand nahin karta. Aur agar tum shukar karo to usey woh tumhare liye pasand karta hai. Koi bojh uthane wala kisi dusre ka bojh na uthayega.Aakhir e kaar tum sab ko apne Rubb ki taraf palatna hai, phir woh tumhein bata dega ke tum kya karte rahe ho, woh to dilon ka haal tak jaanta hai

ar: ۞وَإِذَا مَسَّ ٱلۡإِنسَٰنَ ضُرࣱّ دَعَا رَبَّهُۥ مُنِيبًا إِلَيۡهِ ثُمَّ إِذَا خَوَّلَهُۥ نِعۡمَةࣰ مِّنۡهُ نَسِيَ مَا كَانَ يَدۡعُوٓاْ إِلَيۡهِ مِن قَبۡلُ وَجَعَلَ لِلَّهِ أَندَادࣰ ا لِّيُضِلَّ عَن سَبِيلِهِۦۚ قُلۡ تَمَتَّعۡ بِكُفۡرِكَ قَلِيلًا إِنَّكَ مِنۡ أَصۡحَٰبِ ٱلنَّارِ
t: Waitha massa alinsana durrun daAAa rabbahu muneeban ilayhi thumma itha khawwalahu niAAmatan minhu nasiya ma kana yadAAoo ilayhi min qablu wajaAAala lillahi andadan liyudilla AAan sabeelihi qul tamattaAA bikufrika qaleelan innaka min ashabi alnnari
u: Insaan par jab koi aafat aati hai to woh apne Rubb ki taraf rujoo (return) karke usey pukarta hai, phir jab uska Rubb usey apni niyamat se nawaz deta hai to woh us musibat ko bhool jaata hai jispar woh pehle pukar raha tha aur dusron ko Allah ka humsar thehrata hai taa-ke uski raah se gumraah karey. (Aey Nabi) ussey kaho ke thode din apne kufr se lutf utha le, yaqeenan tu dozakh mein jaane wala hai

ar: أَمَّنۡ هُوَ قَٰنِتٌ ءَانَآءَ ٱلَّيۡلِ سَاجِدࣰ ا وَقَآئِمࣰ ا يَحۡذَرُ ٱلۡأٓخِرَةَ وَيَرۡجُواْ رَحۡمَةَ رَبِّهِۦۗ قُلۡ هَلۡ يَسۡتَوِي ٱلَّذِينَ يَعۡلَمُونَ وَٱلَّذِينَ لَا يَعۡلَمُونَۗ إِنَّمَا يَتَذَكَّرُ أُوْلُواْ ٱلۡأَلۡبَٰبِ
t: Amman huwa qanitun anaa allayli sajidan waqaiman yahtharu alakhirata wayarjoo rahmata rabbihi qul hal yastawee allatheena yaAAlamoona waallatheena la yaAAlamoona innama yatathakkaru oloo alalbabi
u: (kya is shaks ki rawish behtar hai ya us shaks ki) jo mutii-e-farmaan hai, raat ki ghadiyon mein khada rehta hai aur sajdey karta hai, aakhirat se darta aur apne Rubb ki rehmat se umeed lagata hai? In se pucho, kya jaanne waley aur na jaanne waley dono kabhi yaksan ho sakte hain? Naseehat to aqal rakhne waley hi qabool karte hain

ar: قُلۡ يَٰعِبَادِ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ ٱتَّقُواْ رَبَّكُمۡۚ لِلَّذِينَ أَحۡسَنُواْ فِي هَٰذِهِ ٱلدُّنۡيَا حَسَنَةࣱۗ وَأَرۡضُ ٱللَّهِ وَٰسِعَةٌۗ إِنَّمَا يُوَفَّى ٱلصَّٰبِرُونَ أَجۡرَهُم بِغَيۡرِ حِسَابࣲ‏
t: Qul ya AAibadi allatheena amanoo ittaqoo rabbakum lillatheena ahsanoo fee hathihi alddunya hasanatun waardu Allahi wasiAAatun innama yuwaffa alssabiroona ajrahum bighayri hisabin
u: (Aey Nabi) kaho ke aey mere bandon jo imaan laye ho, apne Rubb se daro. Jin logon ne is duniya mein neik rawayya ikhtiyar kiya hai unke liye bhalayi hai. Aur khuda ki zameen waseeh hai, sabr karne walon ko to unka ajar be-hisaab diya jayega

ar: قُلۡ إِنِّيٓ أُمِرۡتُ أَنۡ أَعۡبُدَ ٱللَّهَ مُخۡلِصࣰ ا لَّهُ ٱلدِّينَ
t: Qul innee omirtu an aAAbuda Allaha mukhlisan lahu alddeena
u: (Aey Nabi) insey kaho, mujhey hukum diya gaya hai ke deen ko Allah ke liye khaalis karke uski bandagi karoon

ar: وَأُمِرۡتُ لِأَنۡ أَكُونَ أَوَّلَ ٱلۡمُسۡلِمِينَ
t: Waomirtu lian akoona awwala almuslimeena
u: Aur mujhey hukum diya gaya hai ke sabse pehle main khud muslim banoon

ar: قُلۡ إِنِّيٓ أَخَافُ إِنۡ عَصَيۡتُ رَبِّي عَذَابَ يَوۡمٍ عَظِيمࣲ‏
t: Qul innee akhafu in AAasaytu rabbee AAathaba yawmin AAatheemin
u: Kaho, agar mein apne Rubb ki naafarmaani karoon to mujhey ek badey din ke azaab ka khauf hai

ar: قُلِ ٱللَّهَ أَعۡبُدُ مُخۡلِصࣰ ا لَّهُۥ دِينِي
t: Quli Allaha aAAbudu mukhlisan lahu deenee
u: Kehdo ke main to apne deen ko Allah ke liye khalis karke usi ki bandagi karunga

ar: فَٱعۡبُدُواْ مَا شِئۡتُم مِّن دُونِهِۦۗ قُلۡ إِنَّ ٱلۡخَٰسِرِينَ ٱلَّذِينَ خَسِرُوٓاْ أَنفُسَهُمۡ وَأَهۡلِيهِمۡ يَوۡمَ ٱلۡقِيَٰمَةِۗ أَلَا ذَٰلِكَ هُوَ ٱلۡخُسۡرَانُ ٱلۡمُبِينُ
t: FaoAAbudoo ma shitum min doonihi qul inna alkhasireena allatheena khasiroo anfusahum waahleehim yawma alqiyamati ala thalika huwa alkhusranu almubeenu
u: Tum uske siwa jis jis ki bandagi karna chaho karte raho. Kaho asal diwaliye (losers) to wahi hain jinhon ne qayamat ke roz apne aap ko aur apne ahal-o-aayal ko ghaatey(loss) mein daal diya. khoob sun rakkho, yahi khula diwala (loss) hai

ar: لَهُم مِّن فَوۡقِهِمۡ ظُلَلࣱ مِّنَ ٱلنَّارِ وَمِن تَحۡتِهِمۡ ظُلَلࣱۚ ذَٰلِكَ يُخَوِّفُ ٱللَّهُ بِهِۦ عِبَادَهُۥۚ يَٰعِبَادِ فَٱتَّقُونِ
t: Lahum min fawqihim thulalun mina alnnari wamin tahtihim thulalun thalika yukhawwifu Allahu bihi AAibadahu ya AAibadi faittaqooni
u: Unpar aag ki chatriyan upar se bhi chayi hongi aur nichey se bhi. Yeh woh anjaam hai jissey Allah apne bandon ko darata hai, pas aey mere bandon, mere gazab se bacho

ar: وَٱلَّذِينَ ٱجۡتَنَبُواْ ٱلطَّٰغُوتَ أَن يَعۡبُدُوهَا وَأَنَابُوٓاْ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ لَهُمُ ٱلۡبُشۡرَىٰۚ فَبَشِّرۡ عِبَادِ
t: Waallatheena ijtanaboo alttaghoota an yaAAbudooha waanaboo ila Allahi lahumu albushra fabashshir AAibadi
u: Ba-khilaf iske jin logon ne tagut(false gods) ki bandagi se ijtinab kiya aur Allah ki taraf rujoo karliya unke liye khush khabri hai .Pas (Aey Nabi) basharat dedo mere un bandon ko

ar: ٱلَّذِينَ يَسۡتَمِعُونَ ٱلۡقَوۡلَ فَيَتَّبِعُونَ أَحۡسَنَهُۥٓۚ أُوْلَٰٓئِكَ ٱلَّذِينَ هَدَىٰهُمُ ٱللَّهُۖ وَأُوْلَٰٓئِكَ هُمۡ أُوْلُواْ ٱلۡأَلۡبَٰبِ
t: Allatheena yastamiAAoona alqawla fayattabiAAoona ahsanahu olaika allatheena hadahumu Allahu waolaika hum oloo alalbabi
u: Jo baat ko gaur se sunte hain aur uske behtareen pehlu ki pairwi karte hain, yeh woh log hain jinko Allah ne hidayat bakshi hai aur yahi daanishmand (with understanding) hain

ar: أَفَمَنۡ حَقَّ عَلَيۡهِ كَلِمَةُ ٱلۡعَذَابِ أَفَأَنتَ تُنقِذُ مَن فِي ٱلنَّارِ
t: Afaman haqqa AAalayhi kalimatu alAAathabi afaanta tunqithu man fee alnnari
u: (Aey Nabi) us shaks ko kaun bacha sakta hai jispar azaab ka faisla chaspan ho chuka ho? Kya tum usey bacha sakte ho jo aag mein gir chuka ho

ar: لَٰكِنِ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱتَّقَوۡاْ رَبَّهُمۡ لَهُمۡ غُرَفࣱ مِّن فَوۡقِهَا غُرَفࣱ مَّبۡنِيَّةࣱ تَجۡرِي مِن تَحۡتِهَا ٱلۡأَنۡهَٰرُۖ وَعۡدَ ٱللَّهِ لَا يُخۡلِفُ ٱللَّهُ ٱلۡمِيعَادَ
